name: Joe
subject: the president's rally in Southport
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
He's going all out for his handpicked candidate. With just four days to go and the polls incredibly tight, Republicans think they can win this race. We need to do everything we can to turn out our sup |
---
| | Sorry to bother you after work on Friday, Peter, but this is important: President Trump flew to Southport tonight to campaign for my opponent. And he'll be back in Fort Wayne on Monday.

He's going all out for his handpicked candidate. With just four days to go and the polls incredibly tight, Republicans think they can win this race. _We need to do everything we can to turn out our supporters to vote._

If you haven't voted early yet, you can find your early voting location at [**IndianaVotesEarly.com**](indianavotesearly.com) and please mark it in your calendar when you're going to vote. If you've already voted (thank you!), can you share [**IndianaVotesEarly.com**](indianavotesearly.com) with three people who haven't voted yet?

If our supporters vote, we'll win.

Thanks,
Joe | ********[**DONATE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a5c/7377f838/274fce8f/51ff522c/2657965101/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-southport?refcode=20181102.4d&amount=20")********

name: Ben Mitchell
subject: Get Involved On Super Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjuhnll-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, Things are moving fast on the campaign trail, but with Election Day just a few days away, I wanted to be sure to personally invite you to Super Saturday this weekend! **We are mobilizing Hoosier Conservatives all over our great state for a day of engaging our community to help get out the vote for Mike!** You can participate by **volunteering at your local GOP office** , or by hosting your own Super Saturday by getting your friends together to**knock on doors and make phone calls** asking Hoosiers to vote for Mike Braun on Tuesday! **Your help is critical to fighting for our conservative values** and helping provide reinforcements to President Donald Trump by working to retire Sleepin’ Joe Donnelly! Ben Mitchell
Campaign Manager **P.S. Be sure to tag #TeamBraun in all your pictures, videos, and Facebook Live this weekend!**
#

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: President Trump is Here
body:
Right now, President Donald Trump is here. He's in Indiana, but really it goes even deeper than that. President Trump is in the hearts and minds... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=83c8e96618)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=449381244c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9fae404afc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Donald Trump is Here_** Right now, **President Donald Trump** is here. He's in Indiana today (Southport) and on Monday (Fort Wayne), but really it goes even deeper than that. President Trump is in the hearts and minds of Hoosiers across the state who are fed up with career politicians and business as usual in Washington.

The pundits keep arguing about how **President Donald Trump** will impact Tuesday's critical midterm elections, but we already know.

President Trump is the personification of the change Hoosiers want to see in Washington...and the change we're getting under his leadership. And when you go to vote Tuesday (or when you vote early), that same spirit will be in each of us as we proudly cast our ballots for conservative outsider **Mike Braun** and our entire Republican Right Track Results team!

Hoosiers, **Donald Trump** is with you and me each and every day, and we're ready to Make America Great Again!

If you have time, I'd encourage you to hear from the man himself on one of his TWO visits to the state before Election Day. You can still [RSVP to attend the rally on Monday](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a782141d47&e=1acd9bb3d6) in Fort Wayne.

Or, if you can't see **President Trump** , you can hear from**Mike Braun** \-- our own Hoosier conservative businessman -- at [Right Track Results Tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1a0ab5b7e9&e=1acd9bb3d6) stops in Greenwood, Indianapolis, Whitestown, Lafayette, and Lowell on Saturday and at stops in Mishawaka, Warsaw and Noblesville on Sunday. We just announced that America's Mayor, **Rudy Giuliani** , will even be at the Indianapolis stop on Saturday.

President Trump is here. He's with us as we go to vote, and he's the reason why we're going to WIN on Tuesday. Now let's get out and vote!

-Kyle Hupfer

_PHOTO:**Indiana GOP **__**Chairman Kyle Hupfer **__addresses the crowd at Friday's rally with President Donald Trump, talking about how together, we're going to defeat Democrat Joe Donnelly and elect Mike Braun to the U.S. Senate!_
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=36485c4d53&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f742a7cb26&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Trick-or-Treat at the Governor's Residence_**
Happy (belated) Halloween! On Wednesday, **Governor Eric Holcomb** , **First Lady Janet Holcomb** and **Henry Holcomb** welcomed hundreds of trick-or-treaters to the Governor's Residence for Halloween. Sporting basketball-themed costumes, volunteers joined the Governor in passing out candy to the children.

Last weekend, he went on the road with **Mike Braun** , **Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz and Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** for the Right Track Results Tour -- talking about how Hoosier Republicans are delivering results from the Courthouse, Statehouse and White House. And this weekend, he'll join this team of proven leaders again as the [Right Track Results Tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c4204d8368&e=1acd9bb3d6) continues across Indiana!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ddce3e1a18&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d5c03ae50&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_The Final Week: Braun is BUSY!_**
**Mike Braun** has been working incessantly for Indiana in the final week before the election, and Hoosiers across the state are taking notice! With only a few days before the election, it is more clear than ever that Sleepin' Joe has got to go.

A new poll by Alliance/NRF in conjunction with ScottRasmussen.com found that **Mike Braun** leads Democrat Joe Donnelly by 3 points. This poll confirms the momentum we've seen in polls the last few weeks! And the good news doesn't end there! **Mike Braun's** week also included a decisive debate victory, rallies across the state with prominent endorsements, an exciting new commercial, and much more!

With all this action, here's a quick summary of what you may have missed:
* **Indiana Senate Debate: Mike Braun** scored a clear victory over career politician Joe Donnelly in Indiana's final Senate debate. When Democrat Joe Donnelly wasn't making racially incentive comments ([watch them for yourself here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ecf3100834&e=1acd9bb3d6)), he was trying to cover up his record of siding with the liberal establishment. Meanwhile, **Mike Braun** made it clear that he is a Hoosier job creator who is going to Washington to bring back jobs, fix healthcare, and find solutions to the problems that matter to Indiana. Watch the debate [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb772461d8&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* **Right Track Results Tour: Mike Braun **traveled across Northwest and Southern Indiana on Friday and Saturday last weekend with the [Right Track Results Tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ce4f1f9128&e=1acd9bb3d6) team.
* **Lindsey Graham Rally:** **Mike Braun** stood beside **Senator Lindsey Graham** on Monday at the Allen County GOP Bean Dinner. Senator Graham proclaimed "I think somebody needs to be representing Indiana and trying to help the president more often than Joe does and **Mike Braun** seems to be the answer to your problems."
* **Solutions Tour Continues** : **Mike Braun** was out on the road with many other prominent Republicans as well! On Halloween, he first joined a medical roundtable at OrthoIndy with **Senator John Barasso** to talk with doctors and medical professionals about the challenges their industry faces under Obamacare. Later, he campaigned with **Rep. Mark Meadows** to help remind Hoosiers that progress in Washington - lower taxes, higher wages, and the lowest unemployment in 49 years - is on the line on November 6th.
* **Talking About the Issues** :** Mike Braun** is making national headlines! On Wednesday, he went on Fox News for an interview with Dana Perino to discuss the final debate ([check it out here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a6497416d7&e=1acd9bb3d6)).
* **New “Deserve Better” Ad** : This week, **Mike Braun** released his closing argument for Hoosiers in a new ad: "Deserve Better." In the ad, Mike says politicians like Joe Donnelly will say anything to keep their jobs, and Indiana deserves better. Watch it [now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb04cc7f15&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f29f9bd23f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Final Weekend: Right Track Results Tour!_**
It's time! We're going into the FINAL WEEKEND of the Right Track Results Tour -- and it's going to be a busy few days with EIGHT stops across Central and Northern Indiana, including [a stop in Indianapolis ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d307be27fe&e=1acd9bb3d6)with America's Mayor, **former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani**!

We'll be in Greenwood, Indianapolis, Whitestown, Lafayette and Lowell on Saturday, before moving on to Mishawaka, Waraw and Noblesville on Sunday!

Join **Governor Eric Holcomb** (all stops),**Senator Todd Young**(Greenwood, Indy & Noblesville) as they rally us all in support of **Mike Braun** and our Right Track Results Team of**Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz** and **Treasurer Kelly Mitchell**!

You're not going to want to miss **Rudy Giuliani** and our Right Track Results team, so make sure you're there this weekend! Visit [RightTrackResults.com](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=980860e793&e=1acd9bb3d6) for more details, and follow along with the tour with the hashtag #RightTrackResults!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a054000b4e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Early Voting Is Now Open!_** Already know how you plan to vote in this year's general election? Then it's time to VOTE! Early voting is now open across the state.

Not sure where to vote early, or early vote hours in your county? Check [Vote.GOP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c216f755a6&e=1acd9bb3d6) now to get all the information you need!
---
| [Visit Vote.GOP Now!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2a60eba1bd&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Visit Vote.GOP Now!")
---
|
---
| | **_Indiana Fact of the Week_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48fb175b22&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Polls Are Open from 6 a.m. - 6 p.m. on Tuesday
Early Voting is Now Open! **_
It's the final countdown! Election Day is Tuesday, November 6 and we hope you'll cast your vote. Thanks to responsible Republican leadership, Indiana's on the right track. Your vote will help send **Mike Braun** to the U.S. Senate and allow our statewide Republican team to continue to deliver results for you.

Whether you take advantage of convenient early voting to skip the lines, or prefer to cast your ballot on Election Day, be sure to bring your state-issued photo ID. And as Indiana's own, Vice President Mike Pence says, "friends, don't let friends vote alone." Bring a Republican friend with you! Your vote will ensure that Indiana's positive momentum continues.

If you have questions about where to vote or who's on your ballot, visit [Vote.gop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=42a470ceea&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_ [November 6](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e68d34470d&e=1acd9bb3d6): Election Night with the Indiana Republican Party
[November 6](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=320076147d&e=1acd9bb3d6): Tippecanoe County Election Night Celebration
[December 1](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6a4b0356a7&e=1acd9bb3d6): Kosciusko County Republican Women's Christmas Party
[December 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48ff306dbe&e=1acd9bb3d6): Greater Indianapolis Republican Women's Club Annual Holiday Luncheon
---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_ **Governor Eric Holcomb **[discusses civility and leadership in a speech at Wabash College](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1168bfa8be&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[finalizes report with Intellectual & Developmental Disabilities Task Force](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f5d761448c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Connie Lawson **[joins Senator Lindsey Graham at Allen County GOP Bean Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=58a0aaa936&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell **[announces Indiana's investment returns on fiscal year 2018](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a32a40f73d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[speaks with Indiana Public Radio about keeping government open and accountable](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6ee543bcb3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[works tirelessly to alleviate the humanitarian crises and civil war in Yemen](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fecc6e7e36&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** [thanks the Indiana Manufacturers Association for their endorsement](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d50dfb14c9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[describes his unexpected motorcade ride with President Trump ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3599a6cdf9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita **[calls on the FTC and DOJ to look into Google’s ad manipulation practices](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c71b0a3661&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: Right now, President Donald Trump is here. He's in Indiana, but really it goes even deeper than that. President Trump is in the hearts and minds... | | | | | | | | | Donald Trump is Here Right now, President Donald Trump is here. He's in Indiana today (Southport) and on Monday (Fort Wayne), but really it goes even deeper than that. President Trump is in the hearts and minds of Hoosiers across the state who are fed up with career politicians and business as usual in Washington. The pundits keep arguing about how President Donald Trump will impact Tuesday's critical midterm elections, but we already know. President Trump is the personification of the change Hoosiers want to see in Washington...and the change we're getting under his leadership. And when you go to vote Tuesday (or when you vote early), that same spirit will be in each of us as we proudly cast our ballots for conservative outsider Mike Braun and our entire Republican Right Track Results team! Hoosiers, Donald Trump is with you and me each and every day, and we're ready to Make America Great Again! If you have time, I'd encourage you to hear from the man himself on one of his TWO visits to the state before Election Day. You can still in Fort Wayne. Or, if you can't see President Trump , you can hear fromMike Braun \-- our own Hoosier conservative businessman -- at stops in Greenwood, Indianapolis, Whitestown, Lafayette, and Lowell on Saturday and at stops in Mishawaka, Warsaw and Noblesville on Sunday. We just announced that America's Mayor, Rudy Giuliani , will even be at the Indianapolis stop on Saturday. President Trump is here. He's with us as we go to vote, and he's the reason why we're going to WIN on Tuesday. Now let's get out and vote! -Kyle Hupfer PHOTO:Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer addresses the crowd at Friday's rally with President Donald Trump, talking about how together, we're going to defeat Democrat Joe Donnelly and elect Mike Braun to the U.S. Senate! | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Trick-or-Treat at the Governor's Residence Happy (belated) Halloween! On Wednesday, Governor Eric Holcomb , First Lady Janet Holcomb and Henry Holcomb welcomed hundreds of trick-or-treaters to the Governor's Residence for Halloween. Sporting basketball-themed costumes, volunteers joined the Governor in passing out candy to the children. Last weekend, he went on the road with Mike Braun , Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz and Treasurer Kelly Mitchell for the Right Track Results Tour -- talking about how Hoosier Republicans are delivering results from the Courthouse, Statehouse and White House. And this weekend, he'll join this team of proven leaders again as the continues across Indiana! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | | The Final Week: Braun is BUSY! Mike Braun has been working incessantly for Indiana in the final week before the election, and Hoosiers across the state are taking notice! With only a few days before the election, it is more clear than ever that Sleepin' Joe has got to go. A new poll by Alliance/NRF in conjunction with ScottRasmussen.com found that Mike Braun leads Democrat Joe Donnelly by 3 points. This poll confirms the momentum we've seen in polls the last few weeks! And the good news doesn't end there! Mike Braun's week also included a decisive debate victory, rallies across the state with prominent endorsements, an exciting new commercial, and much more! With all this action, here's a quick summary of what you may have missed: Indiana Senate Debate: Mike Braun scored a clear victory over career politician Joe Donnelly in Indiana's final Senate debate. When Democrat Joe Donnelly wasn't making racially incentive comments (), he was trying to cover up his record of siding with the liberal establishment. Meanwhile, Mike Braun made it clear that he is a Hoosier job creator who is going to Washington to bring back jobs, fix healthcare, and find solutions to the problems that matter to Indiana. Watch the debate . Right Track Results Tour: Mike Braun traveled across Northwest and Southern Indiana on Friday and Saturday last weekend with the team. Lindsey Graham Rally: Mike Braun stood beside Senator Lindsey Graham on Monday at the Allen County GOP Bean Dinner. Senator Graham proclaimed "I think somebody needs to be representing Indiana and trying to help the president more often than Joe does and Mike Braun seems to be the answer to your problems." Solutions Tour Continues : Mike Braun was out on the road with many other prominent Republicans as well! On Halloween, he first joined a medical roundtable at OrthoIndy with Senator John Barasso to talk with doctors and medical professionals about the challenges their industry faces under Obamacare. Later, he campaigned with Rep. Mark Meadows to help remind Hoosiers that progress in Washington - lower taxes, higher wages, and the lowest unemployment in 49 years - is on the line on November 6th. Talking About the Issues : Mike Braun is making national headlines! On Wednesday, he went on Fox News for an interview with Dana Perino to discuss the final debate (). New “Deserve Better” Ad : This week, Mike Braun released his closing argument for Hoosiers in a new ad: "Deserve Better." In the ad, Mike says politicians like Joe Donnelly will say anything to keep their jobs, and Indiana deserves better. Watch it ! | | | | | Final Weekend: Right Track Results Tour! It's time! We're going into the FINAL WEEKEND of the Right Track Results Tour -- and it's going to be a busy few days with EIGHT stops across Central and Northern Indiana, including America's Mayor, former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani! We'll be in Greenwood, Indianapolis, Whitestown, Lafayette and Lowell on Saturday, before moving on to Mishawaka, Waraw and Noblesville on Sunday! Join Governor Eric Holcomb (all stops),Senator Todd Young(Greenwood, Indy & Noblesville) as they rally us all in support of Mike Braun and our Right Track Results Team ofSecretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz and Treasurer Kelly Mitchell! You're not going to want to miss Rudy Giuliani and our Right Track Results team, so make sure you're there this weekend! Visit for more details, and follow along with the tour with the hashtag #RightTrackResults! | | | Early Voting Is Now Open! Already know how you plan to vote in this year's general election? Then it's time to VOTE! Early voting is now open across the state. Not sure where to vote early, or early vote hours in your county? Check now to get all the information you need! | "Visit Vote.GOP Now!" | | | Indiana Fact of the Week | | Polls Are Open from 6 a.m. - 6 p.m. on Tuesday Early Voting is Now Open! It's the final countdown! Election Day is Tuesday, November 6 and we hope you'll cast your vote. Thanks to responsible Republican leadership, Indiana's on the right track. Your vote will help send Mike Braun to the U.S. Senate and allow our statewide Republican team to continue to deliver results for you. Whether you take advantage of convenient early voting to skip the lines, or prefer to cast your ballot on Election Day, be sure to bring your state-issued photo ID. And as Indiana's own, Vice President Mike Pence says, "friends, don't let friends vote alone." Bring a Republican friend with you! Your vote will ensure that Indiana's positive momentum continues. name: Madeleine Albright
subject: I need your help right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Tom's campaign in Arizona could make or break Democrats' chances at a majority but -- with only 4 days until Election Day Tom is falling short of the resources he needs to get voters to the polls on N
I emailed you last month. But I am emailing again. That is how important this moment is. Tom's campaign in Arizona could make or break Democrats' chances at a majority but -- **with only 4 days until Election Day Tom is falling short of the resources he needs to get voters to the polls on November 6th.** There is no time to waste - I am pleading with you right now to click the link below and urgently rush a donation to Tom's campaign before it is too late. **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b3_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** There is so much at stake, I hope I can count on you to step up. Madeleine Albright \-----forwarded message----- From: Madeleine Albright Subject: I am anxious **This is urgent --** **[I am asking for $25 to help get Tom O'Halleran to Congress.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b3_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I have been in politics for decades. I have broken glass ceilings as the first female Secretary of State and gone toe to toe with some of the world's toughest leaders. It takes a lot to make me uneasy, but right now,**I am anxious.** The midterm elections are just 9 days away and control of the House could come down to just one or two races. **Tom 's race could decide control of Congress so I am personally reaching out to ask you to rush urgently needed support to Tom's campaign today.** **You can do your part by using this link to send a donation right now:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b3_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It is clear that Tom is on a mission to restore sanity in our nation's capital. He is a champion for ensuring all Americans have access to accessible and affordable health care and has shown time and again that he will put the needs of Arizona first. But this race is going to be a close one and Tom needs your help in these final days. **Can I count on you to contribute to Tom 's campaign today? Here's the link again:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b3_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** These are dire times. The current administration, along with the GOP-led Congress, is dividing this country from our allies and turning Americans against one another. Our shared Democratic values are on the chopping block. If Democrats don't take back the House, I fear the fabric of our nation could be seriously damaged. **Electing Democrats like Tom who will check this president is now a matter of national urgency.** So, before I sign off, I am going to directly ask you one last time: As a fellow American, will you do your part to bring this country back together by chipping in to elect Tom in this high-priority race? **If you answered yes, then please click this link right now:** [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b3_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you for standing up for our American values, Madeleine Albright | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b3_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: The Roots of Political Polarization
body:
**The Roots of Political Polarization**
_Our politics seem to be degenerating because we no longer understand each other’s priorities._

The Wall Street Journal | Bobby Jindal

|

_ILLUSTRATION: DAVID KLEIN_
---
Political debates today seem more intense because conservatives and liberals are more often starting from different first principles. It is harder to compromise when each side is promoting values that seem mutually exclusive. This modern-day culture war has polarized disputes over legislation, judicial nominations and speech on college campuses. Taking a step back and understanding each other’s priorities is key to making progress.

_Truth vs. social justice._ In a reversal of traditional liberal values, the left now prioritizes social justice over free speech, respect for facts, and the marketplace of ideas. The Obama Justice Department found in 2014 that the shooting of Michael Brown by a police officer in Ferguson, Mo., had been justified, and that Brown hadn’t had his hands up—but that didn’t slow the left’s “hands up, don’t shoot” narrative. Many opponents of Brett Kavanaugh made clear that his originalist judicial philosophy made them more likely to believe the uncorroborated accusations of personal misconduct against him.

Preventing a conservative majority on the Supreme Court was seemingly more important than what actually happened years ago. Social psychologist Jonathan Haidt has documented how the triumph of social justice over truth has resulted in speech codes, safe spaces, bans on microaggressions, and the censoring of conservative voices on many college campuses—the places that should be most dedicated to the uncensored pursuit of truth.

[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=10904&l=203&ctl=2B69E:C15079EF2606CA7C9A76A6EEB71CA99C696548644412C47B&)

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7C9A76A6EEB71CA99C696548644412C47B)

subject: Key elections are dead heats - let's make sure Democrats win!
body:
Activist - Polls show key races for Governors, Senators, and Representatives are **dead heats**. That's why Donald Trump is unleashing racist hatred in a desperate and despicable campaign to save Republicans. Our Blue Wave can still elect Democrats all across the country, but **we need to turn out every possible Democratic voter**. **1.[Use our amazing Progressive Voter Guide to see all the candidates on your ballot and who has endorsed them on both sides.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tyKZ9/6/Dy/r5cs/6ftOvF/vYlrQEbF7W/P/P)** Find your polling place and prepare your ballot in advance for stress-free voting. **2.[Download the VoteWithMe app to see which of your friends are registered in crucial swing districts, and urge them to vote for Democrats.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tyKZ9/s/pR/r5cs/6ftOvF/szVIZP9gt6/P/P) ** 3\. [**Volunteer to canvass your neighborhood with The Last Weekend**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tyKZ9/v/DN/r5cs/6ftOvF/zqftbJpvYu/P/P)\- it's not too late! 4\. **Do you need a ride to the polls on Tuesday, or know someone who does?**
* **[Lyft](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tyKZ9/z/DI/r5cs/6ftOvF/UvN1LCB7uR/P/P)** is offering 50% off on Election Day. Enter your zip code for the promo code.
* **[Uber](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tyKZ9/U/DA/r5cs/6ftOvF/zbHFmBQWlc/P/P)** is offering $10 off a single ride to the polls on Election Day on the most affordable Uber option available in your city. Look for the Election Day code in your app on Election Day.
* **[Lime](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tyKZ9/j/D4/r5cs/6ftOvF/UBAvnNiTOG/P/P)** is offering free rides in 100 cities on bikes, e-bikes, and e-scooters. Download the app and use code LIME2VOTE18.

5\. **If you have any problem voting** , **call 866-OUR-VOTE** (866-687-8683) from your polling place to get immediate help so your vote is properly cast and counted. Then report the problem to **[Trust The Vote](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tyKZ9/5/Dg/r5cs/6ftOvF/Utwbi6DjOE/P/P)** which is mapping all voting problems to look for patterns so local reporters can investigate them. **This Tuesday is Election Day** \- thank you for building the Blue Wave!! Bob Fertik

name: Melania Trump
subject: I never envisioned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
From the moment my husband, Donald, placed his hand on the bible |
---
| | | | | | |
Friend,

>From the moment my husband, Donald, placed his hand on the bible and took the oath of office to serve as America's President, he has worked nonstop to deliver on his promises.

Democrats and the opposition media are doing everything they possibly can to discredit Donald with false accusations by spreading their fake news and making it appear that he does not have the support of America's voters.

**[That is why I am asking that you join my husband as he fights for our nation by signing your Presidential Pledge of Support.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3d3a57e5badd7ce5a8000061690726ae124db507a5810a0704439a1c753baa8b2397c7c6e4d61059049048257450722ab1b7ec368c48169a)**

Up until a few years ago, I never envisioned that I would one day serve our nation as First Lady.

Everything you and I believe in regarding the future of America is on the line in the coming months. _This is a battle we must win together._

I'm asking you and other Americans across the country to personally register your support and help prove that the Democrats and media are wrong.

**[Please sign your Presidential Pledge of Support. I look forward to telling Donald that you are standing with him.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3d3a57e5badd7ce5f4fbadc63fb9da85336c61dda3494a247089ca4c069478de2eb2aa757d59276d5974cb7320581b5617e6468450683d89)**

name: Claire McCaskill
subject: three (scary) things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend - I've got three things I need you to know about this race:
* Right-wing groups have launched over a dozen ad buys against me.
* Our seat in Missouri is one of the most likely to switch parties, and CNN calls me one of the most vulnerable Democrats in 2018.
* We still need to raise $_10,968 by tonight_ to stay on track to hit our monthly goal.

I'm fighting with everything I've got, every single day, against the most reckless parts of President Trump's agenda. But there's so much at stake, and I can't win without you. **Please: Can you give $5 or more right now to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat?**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Claire McCaskill and Jeanne Shaheen:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk918-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk918-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk918-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk918-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thanks so much for everything.

Claire

subject: Giving everything we have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2991393/19565237/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDBmNTYxZi02YmRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7m_PkLnFYH5S57S19F-eNXgdcqpRvw9LZoiMsPvGut4=)
Join our team! [Volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2991394/19565238/-1214481066?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDBmNTYxZi02YmRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7m_PkLnFYH5S57S19F-eNXgdcqpRvw9LZoiMsPvGut4=) or [donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2991395/19565239/1664269967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDBmNTYxZi02YmRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7m_PkLnFYH5S57S19F-eNXgdcqpRvw9LZoiMsPvGut4=).
---
Peter,

Yesterday I joked to a super-volunteer, "I could have bought a new car, but I ran for Congress instead."

Over the last year, I've run my old Camry into the ground. After driving from Austin to Houston and back, countless times, the car has 227,238 miles on it. The front bumper is attached with duct tape. But we are still moving, driving through the beautiful Texas countryside to get out the vote. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2991396/19565240/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDBmNTYxZi02YmRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7m_PkLnFYH5S57S19F-eNXgdcqpRvw9LZoiMsPvGut4=) [**Three days remain until election day, and we've put everything we have into this campaign. Please donate today for the final push.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2991397/19565241/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDBmNTYxZi02YmRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7m_PkLnFYH5S57S19F-eNXgdcqpRvw9LZoiMsPvGut4=) This campaign has been grassroots the whole way. **No corporate PAC money. No DC consultants.** We have fifteen staff members and hundreds of volunteers, and we are reaching thousands of voters every day. Every dollar you donate goes to direct contact with Texas voters. **And it's working! Early voting closed yesterday, and we had record turnout across the Texas 10th.** Here's just one headline: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2991398/19565242/-1200089426?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDBmNTYxZi02YmRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7m_PkLnFYH5S57S19F-eNXgdcqpRvw9LZoiMsPvGut4=) Travis County turnout has exceeded the last presdential election, which is great news for this campaign. And returns in Bastrop County are huge as well. We are on the brink of shocking the nation! **[W](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2991399/19565243/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDBmNTYxZi02YmRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7m_PkLnFYH5S57S19F-eNXgdcqpRvw9LZoiMsPvGut4=)**[**e need to raise $5,000 to get us to the finish. Help us get there today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2991400/19565244/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDBmNTYxZi02YmRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7m_PkLnFYH5S57S19F-eNXgdcqpRvw9LZoiMsPvGut4=)

Thank you to all of you that have helped us get this far. Our team is putting everything on the line to bring this home for Texas!

clean_body: = Join our team! = or =. Peter, Yesterday I joked to a super-volunteer, "I could have bought a new car, but I ran for Congress instead." Over the last year, I've run my old Camry into the ground. After driving from Austin to Houston and back, countless times, the car has 227,238 miles on it. The front bumper is attached with duct tape. But we are still moving, driving through the beautiful Texas countryside to get out the vote. = = This campaign has been grassroots the whole way. No corporate PAC money. No DC consultants. We have fifteen staff members and hundreds of volunteers, and we are reaching thousands of voters every day. Every dollar you donate goes to direct contact with Texas voters. And it's working! Early voting closed yesterday, and we had record turnout across the Texas 10th. Here's just one headline: = Travis County turnout has exceeded the last presdential election, which is great news for this campaign. And returns in Bastrop County are huge as well. We are on the brink of shocking the nation! = Thank you to all of you that have helped us get this far. Our team is putting everything on the line to bring this home for Texas! For our future, Mike P.S. Here's our "classic" campaign car! To be retired soon... = = = = = = Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701.

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Our Closing Ad: Courage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
Election Day is almost here. As Minnesotans prepare to head to the polls, I have one final message.
It's our closing ad, and it's about having the courage to get things done -- because that's what we need more of in Washington right now. Watch it here:
[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0z161%2BrJyfxvSMSc2L1jAic%2BhCRrSbKu)
---
Every year, I visit all 87 Minnesota counties. I go to work every day with just one goal in mind: **getting the job done for Minnesotans.**
I work with Democrats, Republicans, and Independents to tackle the issues that matter most. Because I believe courage isn't about standing in your corner of the boxing ring and throwing insults at the other side. **Courage means standing next to someone you don 't always agree with for the betterment of this country.**
I hope I've earned your support this election. Please share this final message with your friends, and make sure they have a plan to vote in this critical election.
See you soon,
Amy Klobuchar
[**Contribute**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=xjtHq9KFU%2FDwlJDsP4m%2BBic%2BhCRrSbKu)

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: We weren’t up against this back then
body:
|
#
Peter -- When we launched this campaign nearly a year ago, the pundits and partisans in Washington didn’t think we had a chance at winning. **But here’s what I’ve seen in the last 11 months: Tennesseans of every background and from every part of the state are taking ownership of this race. They’re ready to get our country back to doing big things -- to get things done for Tennessee.** This is not the first time I’ve seen this. When I ran for re-election in 2006, our campaign won all 95 counties here in Tennessee -- a first in state history. We did it by working together to find common-sense solutions to the issues hurting our communities. Back then, we weren’t up against this new kind of politics coming out of Washington. We weren’t up against Super PACs and dark money groups blanketing the state with lies and negative ads. And we weren’t up against the toxic hyper-partisanship that’s dominating our politics. But here’s what’s still true, Firstname — despite all the millions of dollars they’ve poured into this race, we still have the momentum, in large part because of folks like you chipping in to help. Now we have just one final fundraising deadline left in this campaign, and I’m personally asking for your help again: **Can you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can right now to our campaign for the final days of this election? Your support will be critical to us having the edge at the end of this race.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2995494/19597050/-1207524935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTY4YTJkNi04MWRmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbGKT_z-zPe1vL9ov8AuFu7jf_mYJCv2DOncerTHpRQ=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181103-months&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******

name: Anne Holton
subject: My last message to you before Election Day, Derek. It's about love.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
It's no secret that this is one of the most consequential elections in recent history, and I'm so excited about the options Virginians have this year to represent them --------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Dear Derek,

I can hardly believe it. In just three days Tim and I will head to our polling place in Richmond, Virginia, and cast our votes in the 2018 midterm elections.

It's no secret that this is one of the most consequential elections in recent history, and I'm so excited about the options Virginians have this year to represent them in the House, and of course, the opportunity to re-elect Tim to the Senate.

**These final days can be some of the most exciting, albeit most challenging, days of the entire campaign. Would you consider making a donation to Tim 's operation to elect Virginia Democrats in these last three days? The team sent me this link you can use to help raise $40,000 to run the campaign through Tuesday:**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e376234/2671757000/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND")

We have about $37,500 to go until the deadline and the closing of the polls here in Virginia. There are so many miscellaneous costs in these last days, from clipboards and precisely targeted ads to preparing for the scenario in which any of these House races go into a recount and need the resources to count every last vote.

But all these things come together to create a wave that helps Democrats win.

Recently, Tim has been explaining it like this: **What we need is a wave of decency and compassion and character and caring and community and love.**

I couldn't agree more, and this is something we talk about a lot. When we see all of you, we are hopeful that this wave is indeed coming and that winning on Election Day will bring more than new Democrats to the House - it will bring a much-needed wave of decency.

**Can you help us get there, Derek? Here 's the link again:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e376209/2671757000/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND")

Decency, compassion, caring, community and love have always been in Virginia, and we can show the rest of the country that.

Let's bring it home in three days.

_Anne_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e37620d/2671757000/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND")
---

* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e376203/2671757000/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e376202/2671757000/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e376200/2671757000/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e376206/2671757000/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e37621b/2671757000/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e376219/2671757000/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND") Thanks for having Tim's back!

2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10b8/3e0906/753bae07/3e376218/2671757000/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND&source=20181103_1_FR_AH_anne-november-LDND")

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Through rain or shine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Wednesday in San Antonio, we gathered to thank those who had voted early
and to urge everyone to get every member of their family, every colleague,
every classmate, every neighbor out to decide the election of our
lifetime.

We were welcomed by mariachis (who, interestingly, were the second group
of mariachis -- the first having left when we were delayed by
Austin-to-San Antonio traffic. Life lesson: when one mariachi leaves,
another is soon to follow).

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1001&akid=23625%2E444211%2EUbXqSa ]Beto for Texas

I spoke by megaphone from the back of a pickup truck in the parking lot of
Gilbert Garza park. Students from UTSA, parents with young children (one
celebrating his first birthday!), people from all walks of life were out
under a beautiful sky of rolling clouds.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1002&akid=23625%2E444211%2EUbXqSa ]Beto for Texas

As we often do, we stayed around afterward to take pictures with anyone
who wanted to (remember, in 2018 if you don’t take a picture and post it
immediately, it didn’t happen!) and thank our volunteers. But within
minutes of taking the first picture, the sky opened up and a biblical rain
fell on our heads, soaked our shirts and pants, filled up our shoes. And
yet not a single person in the picture line left, not a single volunteer
packed up and went home. We stayed for another hour in the rain, everyone
sopping wet, big smiles on our faces, laughing and cheering each other on
through the wet chill that we all began to feel.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1003&akid=23625%2E444211%2EUbXqSa ]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1004&akid=23625%2E444211%2EUbXqSa ]Beto for Texas

But also smiling because here we were -- 6 days to go after being on the
road for more than 20 months. Everyone determined to win. Everyone happy
to be alive, to know that we’re in this together, through thick and thin,
through rain or shine.

Everyone knowing we’re going to do everything we can to win this -- so
that we can celebrate the victory of our lifetime for Texas.

We finished taking pictures, said goodbye to the last volunteer and then
got in the Dodge Grand Caravan and made the two hour drive to Corpus
Christi. (We stopped at a gas station along the way and changed into dry
clothes).

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1023&akid=23625%2E444211%2EUbXqSa ]I'm counting on your support to keep me going. Contribute to ensure
our team has the resources we need to contact as many Texans as we can in
these final 3 days.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1024&akid=23625%2E444211%2EUbXqSa ]Contribute
$3
»

Love getting to do this with you. Love all the people who are the
campaign. Grateful for your help to make it possible.

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181103footer&t=1025&akid=23625%2E444211%2EUbXqSa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=23625%2E444211%2EUbXqSa

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Contribute to ensure our team has the resources we need to contact as many Texans as we can in these final 3 days. [ ]Contribute $3 » Love getting to do this with you. Love all the people who are the campaign. Grateful for your help to make it possible. Beto Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Team Ryan
subject: LETTER: "Tim Ryan should be re-elected"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Please read and share this great letter and make sure every voter in this district knows about Tim's record of fighting for working people. | |
---
Friends, Tim Ryan has been fighting every day for the working people of Ohio's 13th District. Jack Morse of IBEW Local 573 said this about Tim's work in a letter to _The Tribune Chronicle:_ "I am the head of a local union with members working on projects across the region, and I want to be very clear -- **Tim Ryan delivers for working people, and he should be re-elected " ** [Read more of Jack's letter, then share it with friends and family >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf0529/1184323716/VEsH/ "http://www.tribtoday.com/opinion/letters-to-the-editor/2018/10/support-tim-ryan-like-he-supports-us/") Jack goes on: Tim secured thousands of union jobs when he helped to bring Vallourec Steel to the Valley; he helped us land a billion-dollar natural gas energy plant in Lordstown, with a second one on the way. He has helped keep our members working for the past several years. On top of that, he has brought back almost $50 million dollars to the Youngstown Air Reserve Station and Camp Garfield (Ravenna Arsenal) for projects that directly employ our members. Most recently he pulled the TJX project from the ashes, and now we have a thousand new jobs coming to our area. True to form, he is already advocating for the construction to be done by union workers. [Please read and share this great letter and make sure every voter in this district knows about Tim's record of fighting for working people. ](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf0529/1184323716/VEsE/ "http://www.tribtoday.com/opinion/letters-to-the-editor/2018/10/support-tim-ryan-like-he-supports-us/") Thanks for your support, \-- Team Ryan [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf0528/1184323716/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_nov18?refcode=em20181103_jacklte_oh13")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf052b/1184323716/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf052a/1184323716/VEsD/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf052d/1184323716/VEsA/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf052c/1184323716/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf052f/1184323716/VEsO/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf052b/1184323716/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90a4/5486deaa/2484ad7e/dcf052a/1184323716/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

Derek, **We need to stop career politicians like Chris Pappas from changing our _Live Free or Die_ motto. ** [ ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSH8BSag1MnAl2Rg39nZk41k-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M-2BEiSuRBr87syLAyHXB9hzXFzSk9N6NisKYHjpH5OqTXAt14jOogT3RFoYOU20tluQ92q9XIsJNEmwyu8oxdxQFbKF8L5rvQtUJ7DvXnAZRin5JHpGA7tCOwVUSbtYr0-2FcdZgH3CFSYXQwXBkEGMe6LWBWttl87SLbugkqWLiqi-2FSwkEbz-2B-2BElXHwaB5fFcywTG-2BcqFNk2Kv-2B5MlMmREMSUhBCGC1XXTMMtZaCOJqgIC-2Fg07kXzrPWl9jb3OxzM8bFBjP8KM4rijfSg80DZNhBQ-3D-3D) No state has a motto that better encapsulates the spirit of its people or our approach to government quite like **_Live Free or Die. _** General Stark knew the spirit it embodied in his famous toast, but liberals like Chris Pappas would rather have a more politically correct motto representing our Granite State. We want to build on what's great about New Hampshire and that's why we want to send a candidate like Eddie Edwards to Washington. **We need your help to raise an additional $5,000 to defend LFOD and get Navy Veteran Eddie Edwards elected on Tuesday.**********[Chip in $25 today to support Eddie Edwards and our New Hampshire Republican team.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSH8BSag1MnAl2Rg39nZk41k-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M-2BEiSuRBr87syLAyHXB9hzXFzSk9N6NisKYHjpH5OqTXAt14jOogT3RFoYOU20tluQ92q9XIsJNEmwyu8oxdxQEwGXLLgP5hPyFrtQtedSqC1pV7s7n20BgTj3Ab1AavsvnulO99LO8ORz956zEv2PVE9iX1GlJ5R351wpt8OaPOZjPY2uv3-2B4k3uAY5oOWdDNHW-2Bs92UsjybS5NW5kIAyLBpTr7HCJT5iVqY6PbTKQzzPoypbXqH93OfF6lCiuzRnvc6z0eJlPN7FpcqNJo4ug-3D-3D) We need your contribution by tonight at Midnight to have an impact on Tuesday's operation. clean_body: Derek, We need to stop career politicians like Chris Pappas from changing our Live Free or Die motto. No state has a motto that better encapsulates the spirit of its people or our approach to government quite like Live Free or Die. General Stark knew the spirit it embodied in his famous toast, but liberals like Chris Pappas would rather have a more politically correct motto representing our Granite State. We want to build on what's great about New Hampshire and that's why we want to send a candidate like Eddie Edwards to Washington. We need your help to raise an additional $5,000 to defend LFOD and get Navy Veteran Eddie Edwards elected on Tuesday.****** We need your contribution by tonight at Midnight to have an impact on Tuesday's operation. Yours in victory, Wayne MacDonaldNHGOP Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire * 03301

name: Dana Bye
subject: It’s time to get out the vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
It's the Saturday before Election Day -- which means it's time to get out the vote! We kicked things off earlier this week at a big event with Senator Tim Kaine, and the energy was truly something special.
| | Peter, It's the Saturday before Election Day -- **which means it 's time to get out the vote!** We kicked things off earlier this week at a big event with Senator Tim Kaine, _and the energy was really something special:_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uv_4O77M2qCouGoqWaXtfYSAGuCWS7NO0QysqBMmsdo=/HOuRH--fdsdha0lST6thFW34R6__4sraZ1tBueUxbz4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **[Join Sen. Kaine in supporting Team Spanberger with a donation today, so we can feed our volunteers and print all the walk packets we need!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uv_4O77M2qCouGoqWaXtfYSAGuCWS7NO0QysqBMmsdo=/HOuRH--fdsdha0lST6thFW34R6__4sraZ1tBueUxbz4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)** Over the next three days, our focus at Team Spanberger is simple: We must reach every one of our supporters, remind them the election is coming up on Tuesday, and make sure they know where and when to vote for Abigail. This weekend alone, we will knock thousands and thousands of doors, and those one-on-one interactions with voters will decide this race. So the next few days are truly critical. [**Make a donation if you can, Peter, to support our team.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uv_4O77M2qCouGoqWaXtfYSAGuCWS7NO0QysqBMmsdo=/HOuRH--fdsdha0lST6thFW34R6__4sraZ1tBueUxbz4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Together, we can and will win this race. Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uv_4O77M2qCouGoqWaXtfYSAGuCWS7NO0QysqBMmsdo=/HOuRH--fdsdha0lST6thFW34R6__4sraZ1tBueUxbz4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uv_4O77M2qCouGoqWaXtfYSAGuCWS7NO0QysqBMmsdo=/HOuRH--fdsdha0lST6thFW34R6__4sraZ1tBueUxbz4=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uv_4O77M2qCouGoqWaXtfYSAGuCWS7NO0QysqBMmsdo=/-iqXvJDO9AiGV65--yb4Dw9fRn5Yl5svuepPuw6QvnE=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

subject: Three more days to victory!
body:

---
| | | Team,

With only four more days until Election Day, Team Banks is moving full steam ahead to victory!

We've had a busy week of events and parades, but we're not done yet. We'd love for you to join us on the campaign trail during these final few days.

On Monday, Jim Banks and his family will be at our campaign headquarters in Fort Wayne having lunch with volunteers and making phone calls from 11:30 am - 1 pm. We hope you'll stop by!

I**f you would like to get involved and make phone calls or help out at the polls on Election Day, email smjustus1977@gmail.com today!**

Thank you for you support,

Steve Justus Campaign Manager, Jim Banks for Congress

subject: President Obama in Georgia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Obama knows that Stacey is the only candidate who will build on his legacy. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa783/34a064cc/308ecb1/70cf5e1/1027297420/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | This is exciting, Some big names are jumping into our race - including President Obama! He was in Georgia to help Get Out The Vote for Stacey Abrams. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa783/34a064cc/308ecb1/70cf5ee/1027297420/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTAzMjAxOC1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11032018-b") President Obama is working hard to elect Stacey the next Governor of Georgia because he knows that she is the only candidate who will build on his legacy by expanding access to health care, fully funding our public schools, creating a thriving, inclusive economy, and fostering a culture of respect. And Georgians agree! That's why Stacey is surging ahead of Brian Kemp. But our next governor will be decided by just a handful of votes, so we can't take anything for granted. We need to push as hard as we can in these final three days. That's why we ask: **[Chip in $3 right now to help us win this election for Stacey Abrams. Together, we will build a Georgia we can all be proud of.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa783/34a064cc/308ecb1/70cf5ee/1027297420/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTAzMjAxOC1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11032018-b")** This race is close, but we can win if all of us step up now. Can we count on you? \- Team Abrams

name: Steven Hershkowitz
subject: Voters need to hear this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
He's simply failed to deliver on any of his promises.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379005/7ab0e2c4/7e7981db/3499b3a5/578833906/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bnej-real-change?refcode=OHQ11038A") Friend, Hey -- I'm Steven, the Rapid Response Director for Ben. We've been pretty busy lately responding to Governor Hogan's many false claims about his record. But I wanted to take a moment to make sure that as one of our dedicated grassroots supporters, you saw that _The Washington Post_ is now reporting what we have been saying all along: They published a story recently that details how Governor Hogan promised to "Change Maryland" when he ran back in 2014, but he's mostly done... nothing. **Getting this message out to undecided voters is part of how we win -- we have to shatter the illusion that Larry Hogan is a centrist, get-things-done governor. Because it simply isn't true.** [**Your donation will help us get the real facts to voters now, when it matters the most: Donate $5 or more now to help tell the truth about Larry Hogan's "Change Maryland" record.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379005/7ab0e2c4/7e7981db/3499b3a5/578833906/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bnej-real-change?refcode=OHQ11038A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379005/7ab0e2c4/7e7981db/3499b3a4/578833906/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bnej-real-change?refcode=OHQ11038A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

Governor Hogan ran in 2014 on a pocketbook-themed pitch that rested on three central promises: Roll back tax and fee increases, create new jobs, and cut wasteful government spending. So how'd he do? Let's break it down:
1. **Governor Hogan failed to roll back tax and fee increases.** In all, he delivered on just 10% of his promise, and the taxes and fees he managed to roll back disproportionately helped big corporations over working families.

2. **Governor Hogan failed to create as many new jobs as the rest of the region or nation.** His economic approach has caused Maryland to lag behind both the region and the nation in job creation. Economists say that the jobs created while Governor Hogan has been governor are due to, "general economic prosperity," and not his policies.

3. **Governor Hogan failed to cut wasteful government spending, so he understaffed public agencies and slowed education funding growth instead.** He has cut more than 1,200 public agency jobs and repeatedly slowed needed education funding increases, including when he withheld $68 million for public schools in 2015 despite the money being included in a bipartisan budget.

The facts are clear -- Governor Hogan is not the governor he promised to be. Maryland can't afford another four years of broken promises, and voters deserve to hear what's at stake. Governor Hogan promised to "Change Maryland" -- but it's time we bring real change to Maryland by electing Ben Jealous.
[**Election Day is on Tuesday, and this message will win if voters can hear it. Help us keep our ads on the air and volunteers knocking on doors every second until the polls close by donating $5 or more right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379005/7ab0e2c4/7e7981db/3499b3a5/578833906/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bnej-real-change?refcode=OHQ11038A")
Thanks,
Steven
Steven Hershkowitz
Rapid Response Director
Ben Jealous for Governor

| | Hi friend, There are only three days until the election. In order to make sure that we protect and extend Rhode Island's progress for another four years, we need to make sure that everyone gets out to the polls and votes. **[Click here to help Get Out The Vote!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a035/5e076a9e/54db28df/144254ea/506641495/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ridems/")** Gina Raimondo has proven herself a strong governor. She's helping Rhode Islanders by making sure that everyone has access to the training and education they need to keep up and get ahead. She's fixing our roads and bridges. She's rebuilding our economy. And it's working -- we now have the lowest unemployment in nearly 30 years, and last year we had the highest wage growth in the nation. But all that progress is at risk -- we all need to pitch in and protect it. **[Will you do your part by committing to help Get Out The Vote right now?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a035/5e076a9e/54db28df/144254ea/506641495/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ridems/")** Thank you for your support. Mike Mike Raia
Senior Advisor

If we succeed in defeating Tammy Baldwin, we will be one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate this cycle.
****

**ELECTION COUNTDOWN**

Goal: **$100,000**

DEADLINE: 3 Days
| [CHIP IN NOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xICBkkZfMlxVGaw8Z4na8IilVUTtwwMJIJX6KgUXLm2vuqlWQVJSWtqfHc-sIlUJKkQo3e81E6XUEt4xZQvxcukSJzUdgTQ4JycuXWuALEZnbC6C8FNUZjWZxnZlPZVh6GV3WkzG9mMquChMQfS-P9Tu47DUx3n_9iHg4PCBkChlnNF4JlVRuq5sBonoGAo2Vynh4yjUXhO6wSG8Jdpy_oU8dxtNLsldyPJJZ2FNXWfO6haiD9shFobk2CH5efRxPRUlSuHuwWXkrPfqk1IcJBl2nvxZ42xUPQD6jkAwAbIC-dqFGcGWLp8RfeGdze69RG5OI8CVy_OTyiczB6VYuM60Vm94W344fJm_atM9ypyr-qfpb0wWPkJFAKpRdXBUmoaWKkOdRMffJDt37vB3M1s%3D)
---

Friend, in just THREE days, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country.

You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not.

If we succeed in defeating Tammy Baldwin, we will be one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate this cycle.

That’s a HUGE deal, friend. We need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda.

We need the help to fix health care. We need the help to build the wall. And we need the help to let you keep more of your hard-earned money.

And let's just be honest: we NEED to win. Wisconsin deserves better than swamp-dwelling elitists like Tammy Baldwin who put their own interests above OURS.

That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this election on November 6th.

**[3 DAYS TO GO: CHIP IN $3](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xICBkkZfMlxVGaw8Z4na8IhXynu7DTzLSM0AX52OGN-8wJdHp9KwJM99M5eobHer4oxvKJKH3eZPUqWEjDBK60Q4UlyDp49b2Abi4cXMDbwaDhda3paL2oEq2h3A4pnQ2wh1kJ9kZSuQKpMQx-UA8B7ZscbvMekqaX9IoDyCb34LdOsls6UHI94yDkqNKmlyDmJZ9DSkgd_yPK5y0lP2jwvHfP255pfL7bmHJd1OJByOc9ZJIw4b0DC3x2TLH9VdKbe5gZ6XoIQF52rknr64PD7AoHXxDXfFLQhHWEg1ZhHj7LNQ3MDoJhCw0x6Ux_b7JUx4ESOw1F3nhzvE2SMGj_8vUzBNaMLI4Dvs-0yRa89XqLyN8ikoP1PVwgJjNfgAhLNfk4LbZGEFkgWt8unU9-s%3D)**
---

We're coming down to the wire now, friend. Just THREE days left.

If you can chip in today to help us raise $100,000, we'll be one step closer to victory. [**Can you contribute $3 or $33 in honor of the 3 days we have left to win this thing?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=fSkH2KCKHfvuyGtl290MTwS4tyjoLEk3uL2qtWDDLg4W1vNIuBK3yl7TRp-MO4F4I-EvEIBMNrCVepf6_60FrkcghFGoE34N1bcxgL8hWDo4N0OZfsfB6i4sbZ7QFwOSkXvvGD0nUfVl2mJcQF2fcJzkbhcRxOuIPtY7GeuQg7ERxi1MPa0cK8YsgaJn1brtQ8S0Syk373j4hjcEyvQl3Auxs8r9-Z7LGhbGFRPsaDx-BK6Am_GNE2GUdLUF73KwVlX0k_AnCx9NudntP09JajHSiU38ph-DXqnzw6rjkBT8uLJC7qBQ_QXuWcc8io7HVjmrt6H9cNxZFTZY8TMVodCgRCn0ATTVK3zO4msI4pjTmzGziUHxQJ273BflbmwJIIEABMU50fCo699KKiHc96QlKK-4izaiccemevZs5xs%3D)

Now is NOT the time to back down, friend. Please, stand up with me today and help keep us going full speed ahead until next Tuesday.

**[3 DAYS TO GO: CHIP IN $3](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xICBkkZfMlxVGaw8Z4na8IhXynu7DTzLSM0AX52OGN-8wJdHp9KwJM99M5eobHer4oxvKJKH3eZPUqWEjDBK60Q4UlyDp49b2Abi4cXMDbwaDhda3paL2oEq2h3A4pnQ2wh1kJ9kZSuQKpMQx-UA8B7ZscbvMekqaX9IoDyCb34L6HVyDGZRi6fm8yRyFm0pcvJ11HF4ca933GgzlgEP2mjKTilHSlbOZqnG0N7hDtmZrZfs6H3f6oWW1Mnoc0UO4zhD8Ihff6KLjMTMqPueXI9KPgwnU87Qa0kVE5Q5Psu03IE-VGtfcohyH3HekSCSfPtqAnkYn1GsAPU9Vg4OEWoU5gtXq6wk_8MGT6FRJZwnUDhcx41WY6SY1kUGSyScMjSux9fgUiE1Th0TFBbOoIw%3D)**
