This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=TnkNXkUc7VoVeAhQm4NuAYMHftKB-FDI0MVnZBhvJmKXl5j6hv9cS190CIBcbIIaNRXwgh1Tl3__60Kr-TgpUBY6nQTy0xDVWEo7IH4aodkRcxuq68rOsj1il0Ibe8uvMmA4fK8ar-aOxBpvlX1btpLWryZBJmC1L4nNb0C-hTA1x769tE0PVJZaiFeqL68y-hVAKbWqMFt-b_nMXHZUuCoHxvAuwa6nALEfcBV9uj9uoEgLZa1oDUcZG06yaZko). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xIaXep8X8fmc3FJm7i6NuLE3T2PuAfarnz1qDLrTgQOXHA2NmZ0GjMt2Jv9_s2P941fph7ID8ZK21QNmuZpPaEXRbc_LyCA_7vwSvo5Men3DiDnlEkUhNpBCLBiyTHleuSPre2897kphW4wn01wmwgGorCs-irMQ9M03NB8-zzFSCJEuzS1Hxi4sDQGrivbnEqfYB3CDO1MdKLMRDXV3zuJ8gkuNEcoq2BgwwsqPLqJOEPPJJQjyxUvg1Aw6w9fxQP5tM1eMAUUI9NxS4yoPIWXhyAmPlCKHn_swuWBB1XC7YB9o4IiDWIOZYpk8naNnx1QjxsEExvYi7QN3TA8l6YvRF3Xjgy2kVLEzo8thsn2S) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xIaXep8X8fmc3FJm7i6NuLGIqP14MIaTODkeJw-lc127XNsvjgyeu3nrc5Rn3f3Yd3TPIqD3u371Uuy2Pf1MjBId2mvUa5OdNZl1Z-bh7IUw4RJAejR6_mdKXSE68Rdtugj54ZtKx-E_ALFcLQmRYWsEMZQy16QNgxyEzv4t4UYUryI_94lDPN7z3mqd8Tve4AEqRzJb2h0mFwQ8c-qtPmwj8MZ71wPGJhTfAjKtxERYLfn-b7hCynsoa5rz0tKoxN1I40cMO5AipF7iyfI6Tad6VSeVAxi5FWFL_hOvdWMhsQKTht1r1dkACLNxhmhy7Mv-W2WcIx2C01vHqf9z77fkoHjWEdfDXHeUgTADxuzf) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xHGAnlmyAPCFXOPYVg9_-6MFVo-27TQEAzrxSkNoUoCdpfJwndxMfCumo912gNqF2wFWjAIC1SVXXS_oRMU7yoyk678Vf0NS4Vm-3WaTUFCUp7oOqDVxu8zQdC_5MyYwBRcy1cC_EinoIz_2LaNNSOCkFtl1w1D0rtftO8IDZyv-7ONDLgm2trEN0b-1xZsLyExO_FtfW97T0mH9t8Frv7yGFaokst6RJIxlR8SlAwF_Q5qp6MN-bNFJJX-514zQDw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xBAstD0GacTF0-WqUpyPHkK6-BuG6dkd-QVKsLra3lLsuWL3mwqQ_QYBzlH5Ozk4NKO-eKB9TXV8AKi4WqIH3QydSF77bQfIo1GWD5OX1rouLTgwQgVkNl6wR2GZrQ4ep5AAaKAWrR3Uj9qcaV55XZidEygiIrWviuLut88kQUZG6I-rQVW11BCKPMzKJU9upGk_fhy_n459SxP4OgnhwobOgbLzlsb84QMEpDoqnBIw87gZYxbF8zSGTXvysEpLSA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xCWqNPwNp4XAN2L6A_1B0F97NN_xNTyt5fLjJNdO9Yz7e4NB3NclCxP3BrMoH1f4R3q5pMXWSvgdpLrqTankZVijZ8Ed1OhEgCtPApODxdUsSZ8E0uH3qgJX9SzjRe0uytm_Ub1dGVqNtxbOF1zmZ2sjcQdjHqIFdA028pPIxllXatiD_ZYjkOzPwb710BDFb7U8vRyGZUynDNmeA_vjN2ae11-BpIpzrwTiVWJhcrcdNvEN1P0jCigX_nbSSLM67Q%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=LmPDjyOlfFjHA3z8SvP3xIaXep8X8fmc3FJm7i6NuLGROV6r817nTfj_8p-RjbPZTx4z9xZZCqvG-bJOZN7c1qkjGFGq27TiHg_vTsjvro9AfmitP-hLSEOQpOEGyU3GqjYZ5jIsoaCjoVDv7xoo-eY--lrAJtMaGUvfgTEz6dIitwkMJTqV-vD73XXNLp0o9tlSuheUGHtSmSz70hVrgXQ8z21JKUGrS3cTy81F3431mPM5aZ9WPT7Ae46hFsM1ugtK-FyHncFptB3R6NgNEYrKIls0y9OlwCNu75R7h-OgtnKQi5Ha5TMZtTYVit205TWEJ1YOodQm1qayrys32TP96Oa6pg38yY0T9glSGPJHZiFyfiJThvCBOn9eqqXshTmghRWNGwnLUptA1DYfow%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=TnkNXkUc7VoVeAhQm4NuAYMHftKB-FDI0MVnZBhvJmKXl5j6hv9cS190CIBcbIIaNRXwgh1Tl3__60Kr-TgpUBY6nQTy0xDVWEo7IH4aodkRcxuq68rOsj1il0Ibe8uvMmA4fK8ar-aOxBpvlX1btpLWryZBJmC1L4nNb0C-hTA1x769tE0PVJZaiFeqL68y-hVAKbWqMFt-b_nMXHZUuCoHxvAuwa6nALEfcBV9uj9uoEgLZa1oDUcZG06yaZko) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=36b54f167ba64ae3be8a62b4164f0e38&_e=TnkNXkUc7VoVeAhQm4NuAYMHftKB-FDI0MVnZBhvJmKXl5j6hv9cS190CIBcbIIaNRXwgh1Tl3__60Kr-TgpUBY6nQTy0xDVWEo7IH4aodkRcxuq68rOsj1il0Ibe8uvMmA4fK8ar-aOxBpvlX1btpLWryZBJmC1L4nNb0C-hTA1x769tE0PVJZaiFeqL68y-hVAKbWqMFt-b_nMXHZUuCoHxvAuwa6nALEfcBV9uj9uoEgLZa1oDUcZG06yaZko) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
** **

clean_body: If we succeed in defeating Tammy Baldwin, we will be one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate this cycle. ** ELECTION COUNTDOWN Goal: $100,000 DEADLINE: 3 Days | Friend, in just THREE days, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country. You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not. If we succeed in defeating Tammy Baldwin, we will be one step closer to maintaining a Republican majority in the Senate this cycle. That’s a HUGE deal, friend. We need every Republican we can get in Washington to support President Trump's America First Agenda. We need the help to fix health care. We need the help to build the wall. And we need the help to let you keep more of your hard-earned money. And let's just be honest: we NEED to win. Wisconsin deserves better than swamp-dwelling elitists like Tammy Baldwin who put their own interests above OURS. That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this election on November 6th. We're coming down to the wire now, friend. Just THREE days left. If you can chip in today to help us raise $100,000, we'll be one step closer to victory. Now is NOT the time to back down, friend. Please, stand up with me today and help keep us going full speed ahead until next Tuesday. I am counting on you. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Josh Hawley
subject: We need pizza for our volunteers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
We are so grateful for all the support, but we could use your help. With this election in full swing, Missourians from all over the state have answered the call to help Team Hawley. We are so grateful for all the support, but we could use your help.

Even if you can’t make it to volunteer, there’s another way you can help out. Long hours of door knocking and phone calls means dozens of hungry volunteers, and you can help make sure we keep them fed and energized. And that’s why we’re giving voters a clear choice in this race: if they want more of the same shouting and bickering from Washington, then Phil Bredesen isn’t for them. But if voters want to hire someone who has a track record of getting things done for Tennessee, then Phil Bredesen is ready for the job.
It’s time for our country to do big things again and get us back to the days where we could work together to get things done. That is why I’m asking:
**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can ahead of our final fundraising deadline in this race? We know things can go either way right now, so the support we’re getting from grassroots supporters like you will make all the difference in this race.**

name: Jason Yates
subject: Two Special Events Before Tuesday!
body:
| | Join with us to PRAY and THINK before we VOTE!
---
| Peter, We say it all the time at My Faith Votes, **_Pray, Think and Vote._** And that’s exactly what we are going to do before Tuesday. I want to invite you to join with Christians for two special events to **PRAY** united with believers across the country and to **THINK** about the issues from a biblical perspective. **_On Sunday, join us for The Event!_** **Sunday, November 4, 2018****
Join us for 90 Minutes**
**3pm PT | 4pm MT | 5pm CT | 6pm ET** National faith leaders are gathering together to think about and discuss how we, as Christians, can help move our country in the right direction and toward a brighter future. Join our Honorary National Chairman **Mike Huckabee,** along with **Andrew Wommack** of Andrew Wommack Ministries, **Tony Perkins** of Family Research Council, **Kristan Hawkins** of Students for Life**, Mike Farris** of Alliance Defending Freedom, and more. Watch this live broadcast from home, or better yet stream the event live at your church! [Learn more about how YOU can join The Event this Sunday evening!](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayzyFsMC7WQyCzLMywZ2qTGs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181103com01&n=1)
* * *
**_Unite in Prayer on Monday_** **Monday, November 5, 2018
****Join us on MyFaithVotes.live or the My Faith Votes Facebook page
****3:30pm PT | 4:30 pm MT | 5:30pm CT | 6:30pm ET** We will come together, the night before the elections to pray for the thousands of elections taking place on Tuesday. We will pray for people to have God’s wisdom as they vote, and we will pray for biblical principles to be advanced on the local level all the way to the federal level, so that we may live peaceful and quiet lives as 1 Timothy 2:1-2 instructs. If you would like us to send you a text reminder so that you can tune in to our live event or silently pray with us from wherever you are, text **PRAY to 40649**. Pray with us while you’re at work, at home, or at school when you get the text message sent directly to your phone. Thousands of prayers joined together - praying for God’s will to be done in our communities and our nation - is powerful. Let’s ignite a unified movement of Christians across the country in these final days before the elections who stand committed to thinking about the issues from a biblical perspective and uniting in prayer. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181103com01&n=2)
---

clean_body: | | Join with us to PRAY and THINK before we VOTE! | Peter, We say it all the time at My Faith Votes, Pray, Think and Vote. And that’s exactly what we are going to do before Tuesday. I want to invite you to join with Christians for two special events to PRAY united with believers across the country and to THINK about the issues from a biblical perspective. On Sunday, join us for The Event! Sunday, November 4, 2018 Join us for 90 Minutes 3pm PT | 4pm MT | 5pm CT | 6pm ET National faith leaders are gathering together to think about and discuss how we, as Christians, can help move our country in the right direction and toward a brighter future. Join our Honorary National Chairman Mike Huckabee, along with Andrew Wommack of Andrew Wommack Ministries, Tony Perkins of Family Research Council, Kristan Hawkins of Students for Life, Mike Farris of Alliance Defending Freedom, and more. Watch this live broadcast from home, or better yet stream the event live at your church! Unite in Prayer on Monday Monday, November 5, 2018 **Join us on MyFaithVotes.live or the My Faith Votes Facebook page 3:30pm PT | 4:30 pm MT | 5:30pm CT | 6:30pm ET We will come together, the night before the elections to pray for the thousands of elections taking place on Tuesday. We will pray for people to have God’s wisdom as they vote, and we will pray for biblical principles to be advanced on the local level all the way to the federal level, so that we may live peaceful and quiet lives as 1 Timothy 2:1-2 instructs. If you would like us to send you a text reminder so that you can tune in to our live event or silently pray with us from wherever you are, text PRAY to 40649. Pray with us while you’re at work, at home, or at school when you get the text message sent directly to your phone. Thousands of prayers joined together - praying for God’s will to be done in our communities and our nation - is powerful. Let’s ignite a unified movement of Christians across the country in these final days before the elections who stand committed to thinking about the issues from a biblical perspective and uniting in prayer. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
| | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c5b7aa1d44&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Jobs Smash Estimates With Gain of 250,000, Wage Gains Pass 3% for First Time Since Recession](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=83f2e3672f&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
Yesterday’s new jobs numbers are a homerun for American workers: “Job growth blew past expectations in October and year-over-year wage gains jumped past 3 percent for the first time since the Great Recession,” Jeff Cox reports. “The unemployment rate stayed at 3.7 percent, the lowest since December 1969 . . . But the bigger story may be wage growth, which has been the missing piece of the economic recovery.”
---
|
---
| [DHS: Caravan Migrants from 20 Countries, Include 270 Convicted Criminals](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=52a96458f4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
The Department of Homeland Security reported this week that people from at least 20 countries—not just citizens of Guatemala and Honduras—make up the two caravan groups approaching the U.S. border, Anna Giaritelli writes. “Over 270 individuals along the caravan route have criminal histories, including known gang membership. Those include a number of violent criminals,” a DHS statement read.

**Watch** : [President Trump addresses America’s border crisis from the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=63e6f0b816&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Wages and Salaries Jump by 3.1%, Highest Level in a Decade](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0d7122267&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“On a yearly basis, wages and salaries jumped 3.1 percent, the biggest increase in 10 years,” CNBC reports. Pay increases had been a missing link in the Obama economic “recovery.” This week’s wage news “came the same day that ADP and Moody’s reported private payroll growth of 227,000 in October, easily beating Wall Street expectations.”
---
|
---
| [Hispanic Unemployment Rate Dips to Record Low in October](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=44ab458d0f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_CNS News_
“The national seasonally-adjusted unemployment rate for Hispanics and Latinos in the U.S. labor force fell to the lowest level on record in October of 2018,” Craig Bannister writes. “In October, the unemployment rate for Hispanics and Latinos, aged 16 and up, was 4.4%, down from 4.5% in September.”
---
|
---
| [Trump Visits Pittsburgh Synagogue to Pay Respects to Victims of Massacre](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33d577e8a5&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
On Tuesday, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump visited the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, where a gunman killed 11 Jewish Americans in the worst anti-Semitic attack in U.S. history last weekend. “Accompanied by Rabbi Jeffrey Myers, the president and first lady laid white roses and stones from the White House - a Jewish tradition - at the makeshift memorial,” Andrew O’Reilly reports.
---
|
---
| [U.S. Consumer Confidence Surged in October to 18-Year High](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=384ab5a6a7&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“A measure of U.S. consumer confidence rose in October to an almost two-decade high, as Americans expected economic and jobs growth to power ahead,” Sharon Nunn reports. “U.S. consumer confidence rose to 137.9 in October, the highest level since September 2000.”
---
|
---
| [Manufacturing Jobs Up 32,000 in October, 434,000 Under Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5230ca0aa1&e=3ee4985eea)
-_CNS News_
“Manufacturing jobs in the United States increased by 32,000 in October and have now increased by 434,000 during the presidency of Donald Trump,” Terence P. Jeffrey reports. American manufacturing employment peaked in 1979 and has been making a comeback under President Trump.
---
|
---
| [Trump: Pledge for More Career Opportunities Helped 6 Million](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31e706ffa0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Associated Press_
“Four months after signing an executive order creating the National Council for the American Worker, President Donald Trump announced Wednesday that more than 160 companies and organizations have pledged to provide more than 6 million new career opportunities for Americans,” including apprenticeships, continuing education, on-the-job training, and reskilling, _The Associated Press_ reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=898b362256&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b8f8617e7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=91adc05a5a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
|

| | | Hi there -- We'll keep this quick.

Early voting in New Mexico ends today! It's vital that we get out the vote for Martin and Democrats up and down the ballot.

[**You can find your early voting polling place here ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4b6/43d8135f/65ab2e1d/51018a6a/507351455/VEsH/ "http://www.sos.state.nm.us/Voter_Information/voter-information-portal.aspx?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+You+can+find+your+early+voting+polling+p&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181103_1_1&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181103_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181103_1_1")

Every vote counts, and we want to make sure you get out and make your voice heard!

[**Here 's the link again to find information on early voting.**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b4b6/43d8135f/65ab2e1d/51018a6d/507351455/VEsE/ "http://www.sos.state.nm.us/Voter_Information/voter-information-portal.aspx?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Herersquos+the+link+again+to+find+inform&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181103_1_1&source=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181103_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_EN_90DO_181103_1_1")

Thanks for supporting Martin!

Heinrich Field Team

subject: Saturdays are for GOTV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It's Saturday -- which means it's time to get out the vote here in Arizona!
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633dc6/1a8421e1/19b40c22d/497c8bad/2983204492/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, It's Saturday -- _**which means it 's time to get out the vote here in Arizona!**_ Our campaign office is packed and our volunteers are out knocking doors. In a race as close as this one, the campaign that gets more of their supporters to the polls wins -- so our get-out-the-vote push this weekend is absolutely critical. **But we 're running a bit short on the resources we need to keep going through Tuesday. **We have to buy more pencils, we need to print more walk packets, and we'd like to buy our awesome volunteers some coffee. **[Can you make a donation to our GOTV fund, so we can finish this race strong and keep AZ-01 blue on Tuesday? Every dollar helps!](http://action.tomohalleran. We're running out of time, team, so I'll keep this quick.

There are only three days left in this campaign, and the far-right special interests are doing everything they can to replace me with someone who rubber-stamps their anti-middle-class agenda.

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Three Days. Four Races.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
**_Neck and neck_** \-- that's what the polls say about four of our races for U.S. House in Minnesota.
Dan Feehan, Angie Craig, Dean Phillips and Joe Radinovich are locked in single-digit races and together we can put them over the top in just three days.
I'm asking one last time -- **will you help change the direction in Washington by splitting a contribution to these great candidates?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Dan Feehan, Angie Craig, Dean Phillips and Joe Radinovich will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hQwlGWVD%2BnCInWynQMB4xvdyC5GwcvMU)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=DkcVZ4zP8SH1HijGgdLpZkLUrFNd0zaK)**

****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=4XbRmjgiZL4Nib7tzZmpovdyC5GwcvMU)****
Everything is on the line. If Dan, Angie, Dean and Joe win they'll work to make progress on combating climate change, protecting our democracy, and taking on the dark money that's flooding our politics with negativity and divisiveness.
**[These are some of the closest races in the country -- will you split a contribution to these four campaigns tonight?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=saPT7hwg8o34U10OrdzwYfdyC5GwcvMU)**
\-- Amy

subject: Clipboards, ads, and voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Derek -- Here is what we need three days out:**
* \-- Supplies (talking to hundreds of thousands of voters requires a lot of clipboards)
* \-- More ads encouraging people to vote at key precincts
* \-- Staff to recruit more volunteers to reach more voters
* \-- Grassroots donations like yours to show our strength through the end.

**We 're attaching Anne Holton's note from earlier about what exactly is at stake (spoiler: it's the decency that makes us the Virginia we want to be). Can you donate below to help us raise $35,200 more and make these things happen? You know exactly where your money is going, and how much it's needed: ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a1/3e0906/750d1ea6/3e37666d/2934481800/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+5&utm_campaign=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&source=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND")

Thank you for making this all possible,

_Team Kaine_

\------------------------------------------------
From: Anne Holton
Date: [Saturday Nov. 3rd at 8:17 a.m.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a1/3e0906/750d1ea6/3e376667/2934481800/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Saturday+Nov+3rd+at+817+am&utm_campaign=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&source=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND")
Subject: My last message to you before Election Day, Derek. It's about love.
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a1/3e0906/750d1ea6/3e376666/2934481800/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+EMAIL&utm_campaign=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&source=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND")

Dear Derek,

I can hardly believe it. In just three days Tim and I will head to our polling place in Richmond, Virginia, and cast our votes in the 2018 midterm elections.

It's no secret that this is one of the most consequential elections in recent history, and I'm so excited about the options Virginians have this year to represent them in the House, and of course, the opportunity to re-elect Tim to the Senate.

**These final days can be some of the most exciting, albeit most challenging, days of the entire campaign. Would you consider making a donation to Tim 's operation to elect Virginia Democrats in these last three days? The team sent me this link you can use to help raise $40,000 to run the campaign through Tuesday:**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a1/3e0906/750d1ea6/3e376665/2934481800/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&source=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND")

We have about $37,500 to go until the deadline and the closing of the polls here in Virginia. There are so many miscellaneous costs in these last days, from clipboards and precisely targeted ads to preparing for the scenario in which any of these House races go into a recount and need the resources to count every last vote.

But all these things come together to create a wave that helps Democrats win.

Recently, Tim has been explaining it like this: **What we need is a wave of decency and compassion and character and caring and community and love.**

I couldn't agree more, and this is something we talk about a lot. When we see all of you, we are hopeful that this wave is indeed coming and that winning on Election Day will bring more than new Democrats to the House - it will bring a much-needed wave of decency.

**Can you help us get there, Derek? Here 's the link again:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a1/3e0906/750d1ea6/3e376664/2934481800/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&source=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND")

Decency, compassion, caring, community and love have always been in Virginia, and we can show the rest of the country that.

Let's bring it home in three days.

_Anne_

[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a1/3e0906/750d1ea6/3e37667b/2934481800/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND&source=20181103_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-FWD-LDND")
---

* * *

clean_body: | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -- Here is what we need three days out: \-- Supplies (talking to hundreds of thousands of voters requires a lot of clipboards) \-- More ads encouraging people to vote at key precincts \-- Staff to recruit more volunteers to reach more voters \-- Grassroots donations like yours to show our strength through the end. We 're attaching Anne Holton's note from earlier about what exactly is at stake (spoiler: it's the decency that makes us the Virginia we want to be). Can you donate below to help us raise $35,200 more and make these things happen? You know exactly where your money is going, and how much it's needed: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for making this all possible, Team Kaine \------------------------------------------------ From: Anne Holton Date: "" Subject: My last message to you before Election Day, Derek. It's about love. To: "" Dear Derek, I can hardly believe it. In just three days Tim and I will head to our polling place in Richmond, Virginia, and cast our votes in the 2018 midterm elections. It's no secret that this is one of the most consequential elections in recent history, and I'm so excited about the options Virginians have this year to represent them in the House, and of course, the opportunity to re-elect Tim to the Senate. These final days can be some of the most exciting, albeit most challenging, days of the entire campaign. Would you consider making a donation to Tim 's operation to elect Virginia Democrats in these last three days? The team sent me this link you can use to help raise $40,000 to run the campaign through Tuesday: "" We have about $37,500 to go until the deadline and the closing of the polls here in Virginia. There are so many miscellaneous costs in these last days, from clipboards and precisely targeted ads to preparing for the scenario in which any of these House races go into a recount and need the resources to count every last vote. But all these things come together to create a wave that helps Democrats win. Recently, Tim has been explaining it like this: What we need is a wave of decency and compassion and character and caring and community and love. I couldn't agree more, and this is something we talk about a lot. When we see all of you, we are hopeful that this wave is indeed coming and that winning on Election Day will bring more than new Democrats to the House - it will bring a much-needed wave of decency. Can you help us get there, Derek? Here 's the link again: "" Decency, compassion, caring, community and love have always been in Virginia, and we can show the rest of the country that. Let's bring it home in three days. Anne "" * | "" "" ""

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- President Donald Trump wants me to lose my job. He is all-in for my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci. President Trump will be visiting the day before Election Day, in hopes to seal the deal. Trump will say what he wants. Renacci will continue to run disgusting attacks ads. And special interests will do their best to make sure Ohio families don't have a voice in the Senate. There's only one way I can fight back: **with your support.** With the help of this grassroots team, we can get out the vote and turn out hardworking Ohioans. [**I need your help. And Peter, by "help," I mean a few bucks. Right now, your contribution will be TRIPLE matched by a generous group of donors, but only until midnight.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd3e/4462dc26/76e4616a/201f1929/3470855409/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103am?refcode=sbe181103am_m") [Your $5 donation -> $15](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd3e/4462dc26/76e4616a/201f1928/3470855409/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181103am?refcode=sbe181103am_m&amount=5")

name: Joe Sweeney, NHGOP
subject: Sign Standing & Watching Your Polls
body:
**Saturday Afternoon, 11/03/2018** Derek, As of this email, we are **just 3 days away** from **Election Day 2018.** It's important to make sure our polling locations throughout the Granite State show a great presence for Republican campaigns, as well as a number of party-designated poll challengers who assist in maintaining the integrity of our elections. We have established an [NHGOP Submission Form](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBl5S95iDKOpGx8O6ixPT6Z-2BlIykRyRQiD4SgNEhPMS1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MUVkfHHx9U6Ex4iaaNVcDQtyEr8I-2F-2BaHsfis6wGwS5xXc6vwO-2FcddKiqw1KGv7E92z2VwfO70r4C4n0cY9kedDD2ELMZ-2BJrOO42wm-2FEG-2FId14Y8umq9KZjQHzZXSfMCkNDP2DN5XTZRkt0Ml1KT3a0srd0oREGjZ3BaV8tdgM2ztgad5yD5N06XB3jKnuy1y3xQ9-2BBOHqLzRIdkaemeWpPcKlV-2BOae2QsZldqmCpqQDAPEFINljnYSsQ9QPnaq63dcHneH-2B-2BJzzlwRTgE-2FR8lXw-3D-3D), which will allow our top-of-the-ticket campaigns to work with our local GOP committees on filling spots where needed across New Hampshire. On the webpage [NH.GOP/election-day](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBl5S95iDKOpGx8O6ixPT6Z-2BlIykRyRQiD4SgNEhPMS1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MUVkfHHx9U6Ex4iaaNVcDQtyEr8I-2F-2BaHsfis6wGwS5xXc6vwO-2FcddKiqw1KGv7E92z2VwfO70r4C4n0cY9kedDLqqkaNKuWlHVQ-2Fo5VekxymafMKM35YLFfa0EJIUj7DKH4Bw95IKmzoTaX5IOCD8FqX6sHT-2B1fhYv268vDUO-2Bzs3subol05Cq1Czs-2BmzFuERG0l-2FUcRaI6d893OfutQFZjhayWapjQz4C3XC6ILo5th0kxAGaM9bAvxmNLTLhuUJqpblFvW2pCBAN5rVhpoFsw-3D-3D), you will find a form to fill out when you want to sign up for shifts for both activities, as well as a downloadable Microsoft Excel sheet template you can complete and email in order to submit multiple volunteers to our tracker. Together, we will secure victory up and down the ballot for New Hampshire Republicans! Let's close this cycle out strong. ****Kindest regards, Joe SweeneyNHGOP Communications Director _**Below, please find addresses for our major campaign offices - these offices can be used to pick up Election Day signs from now until the election.**_ | |

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: What I’ve always been about
body:
| Peter -- My whole career has been about being civil and being respectful of everyone and figuring out how to bring people together to get things done. As mayor, we worked together to revitalize downtown Nashville, and to bring the Predators and Titans to Tennessee. As governor, we expanded access to health care for kids and mothers, made college more affordable, added more than 200,000 new jobs, and balanced eight straight budgets. **We’re giving voters a clear choice in this election. If they like Washington the way it is, with partisan shouting and finger-pointing, I'm not their guy. Congresswoman Blackburn has been steeped in that Washington way for 16 years, and she's good at it. But that's not my world.** I love fixing things. clean_body: | Peter -- My whole career has been about being civil and being respectful of everyone and figuring out how to bring people together to get things done. As mayor, we worked together to revitalize downtown Nashville, and to bring the Predators and Titans to Tennessee. As governor, we expanded access to health care for kids and mothers, made college more affordable, added more than 200,000 new jobs, and balanced eight straight budgets. We’re giving voters a clear choice in this election. If they like Washington the way it is, with partisan shouting and finger-pointing, I'm not their guy. Congresswoman Blackburn has been steeped in that Washington way for 16 years, and she's good at it. But that's not my world. I love fixing things. I want to fix health care, drug prices, and the deficit. I want to bring some fresh air and fresh ideas up to the swamp. But right now, dark money groups and Washington insiders are saying, spending, and doing whatever it takes to buy this election for Congresswoman Blackburn. That’s why I’m asking for your help -- can you add a donation of $10 or more before the final grassroots fundraising deadline of our campaign so we can shake off these attacks before Election Day? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thanks for your help -- I truly appreciate it. name: Tori Taylor
subject: three-coffee kinda Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
This is going to be a three-coffee kinda day, even though it's Saturday. And we need your help today. I just pulled out my laptop to send you a quick note. As this is the final weekend
|
---

| | This is going to be a three-coffee kinda day, even though it's Saturday. And we need your help today. I just pulled out my laptop to send you a quick note. As this is the final weekend before Election Day, the field team is moving full steam ahead talking to as many voters as possible. **The field team is aiming to knock on 15,000 doors in the next two days.[_Once again -- and for the final time -- we need the digital team to match them, door-for-dollar. Will you help us raise $15,000 before midnight tomorrow?_](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542792f/e3b7d3/5e30cd4b/25556e23/3826068031/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181103am?refcode=kme181103am_m")** This race is a toss-up. Congress Ted Budd and all his special interest pals are resorting to fear mongering and false attacks to defeat us. This race has become a who's who of outside special interest groups attacking Kathy - from the Koch Brothers, President Trump, the NRA, and Paul Ryan's Super PAC. _But we can win this._ After I hit send on this, the laptop's going away, I'm meeting up with Kathy (coffees in hand), and we're heading out to meet more voters. Every voter we reach this weekend could be the decider. **And every dollar we raise will go straight out the door to help us make those contacts.** [_**Even if all you can spare is $3, it'll do more good than you might think. Get your contribution in and help us hit our $15,000 goal in the next 48 hours.**_](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542792f/e3b7d3/5e30cd4b/25556e23/3826068031/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181103am?refcode=kme181103am_m") We're closing in on the end here. Let's do this! Tori Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: betofortexas.com
subject: Under 100 hours:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

There are fewer than 100 hours left before the polls close on Election
Day, November 6. Now is our moment. A brand-new poll from Emerson shows
Beto down by just three points. We’re preparing an ads push and revving up
our volunteer-powered voter contact machine to close the gap. But for us
to pull this off, we need to hit our FINAL fundraising goal of this
campaign.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1019&akid=23913%2E444211%2EpZe8zF ]We need to raise $3.5 million before the polls close on November 6 to
cover the ads and field costs required to push Beto over the top. Can you
chip in a contribution of
$3
to help us get there and show that we won’t slow down until we elect Beto?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1020&akid=23913%2E444211%2EpZe8zF ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1021&akid=23913%2E444211%2EpZe8zF ]Beto for Texas

Beto never could’ve gotten this far without thousands of people like you
contributing, volunteering and refusing to give in. We need to keep up our
momentum by spreading Beto’s positive message to as many Texas voters as
we can in these final hours. But it’s costing nearly $1 million per day to
keep this last, and largest, part of our operation to elect Beto running.

Do not miss this moment. People in every county in Texas and across the
country are all volunteering and contributing. Texas voters broke records
during early voting. This is what momentum looks like.

For the time that Ted Cruz has been in the Senate, he’s done a lot of
damage. We can stop him from doing a lot more. If we don’t raise enough
money to reach all the voters we need to win, so much of our work will be
in jeopardy.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1022&akid=23913%2E444211%2EpZe8zF ]I know this grassroots network is ready for a final, epic push. Our
question is: will you be part of it? Pitch in
$3
now and help us elect Beto.

Thank you for everything so far,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1023&akid=23913%2E444211%2EpZe8zF ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181103footer&t=1024&akid=23913%2E444211%2EpZe8zF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=23913%2E444211%2EpZe8zF

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Justin Jones
subject: “the polarizer against the problem-solvers”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Abigail has made this once-safely Republican district into a tied race because her commitment to problem-solving strikes a clear contrast with Rep. Dave Brat's hyperpartisan record. A recent Washington Post headline put it pretty perfectly.
| | Peter, Abigail has made this once-safely Republican district into a tied race because her commitment to problem-solving strikes a clear contrast with Rep. Dave Brat's hyperpartisan record. _Washington Post_ columnist E.J. Dionne recently profiled our race, Peter, and the headline put it pretty perfectly: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C4FeszekCeQc8UKCcN_r4wrSLE0TGzy4GV_CHZarx5g=/4JlVy3UnGWhO5uD4e5Plzq408wq1LivQhog-jDDeS9M=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [**Help us send a great problem-solver to Congress with a donation today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C4FeszekCeQc8UKCcN_r4wrSLE0TGzy4GV_CHZarx5g=/4JlVy3UnGWhO5uD4e5Plzq408wq1LivQhog-jDDeS9M=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Our race is continuing to draw national attention as we inch closer to Election Day, Peter, because Abigail's compelling biography and her commitment to service are resonating, and this race is now a tie. But good polls and news stories don't win races -- voters do! We have just three days to go, [**so please chip in, so we can get our supporters to the polls and win.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C4FeszekCeQc8UKCcN_r4wrSLE0TGzy4GV_CHZarx5g=/4JlVy3UnGWhO5uD4e5Plzq408wq1LivQhog-jDDeS9M=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Justin Jones _Communications Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C4FeszekCeQc8UKCcN_r4wrSLE0TGzy4GV_CHZarx5g=/4JlVy3UnGWhO5uD4e5Plzq408wq1LivQhog-jDDeS9M=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C4FeszekCeQc8UKCcN_r4wrSLE0TGzy4GV_CHZarx5g=/4JlVy3UnGWhO5uD4e5Plzq408wq1LivQhog-jDDeS9M=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/C4FeszekCeQc8UKCcN_r4wrSLE0TGzy4GV_CHZarx5g=/Eha2BKxhrq4NezhM0iSgb9yvLYYgc8fKq2R6QbCK4jQ=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: Team Hawley
subject: Don't look back and wish you had done more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
We're all counting on you to have a voting plan in place Nobody wants to look back and wish they had done more, and this election is no different. That’s why Team Hawley has been working overtime to win, but at the end of the day, your vote is what will honestly decide the results.

Josh Hawley will be our voice in Washington, and we need to make our voices heard now. With just three days left until Election Day, we’re all counting on you to have a voting plan in place. Gather your friends, family, and neighbors, and vote for Josh Hawley on Tuesday, November 6th. name: Martin Sheen
subject: fwd: From President Bartlet's desk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Martin Sheen here again. There's only 3 days until the election and Tom urgently needs your help right this moment. And it is.
Hi there -- Martin Sheen here again. I wanted to make sure you saw my email from a few days ago (see below). Well now, it's crunch time. **There 's only 3 days until the election and Tom urgently needs your help right this moment. **Please, if you can, pitch in $25 to help Tom pull off a victory on November 6th. **Here 's a link to rush a donation:** [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/pitch-in**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks in advance for contributing, Martin Sheen \-----forwarded message----- From: Martin Sheen Subject: From President Bartlet's desk When a (_fictional_) former president sends you an email, you know it must be important... And it is. [**Today, I 'm personally asking you to chip in $25 to support Democrat Tom O'Halleran, who is running in a very important race that could decide control of Congress.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") My guess is that you might remember me as President Bartlet from the "_West Wing._ " Though I no longer play a fictional president, my concerns about the way our country is heading are very real. President Trump and the Republican Congress are pushing a dangerous agenda, and the best way to stop them in their tracks is to elect a Democratic House in November. That's why I'm so excited about Tom's campaign. He is the kind of leader who always puts hard-working families first and will always fight for you, not the special interests or mega donors. [**In these final few days before Election Day, can I count on you to join me in supporting Tom with a grassroots donation of any size?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$25](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Electing leaders like Tom is the way to get our country back on track, which is why I'm committed to doing everything I can to make that happen.

[**I 'd love it if you'd join me in this fight by pitching in what you can, as soon as you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Martin Sheen

P.S. As Bobby Kennedy said, "One heart with courage is a majority."

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.03_b2_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

Thanks for having Tom's back!

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: most important moment for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team -- We're approaching your last chance to make a contribution to my reelection campaign and have it make a meaningful difference in the outcome. I wanted you to know that, everyone, as you weigh whether to pitch in.
This is the most important moment for our campaign, especially because voters are already casting their ballots. **That 's not hyperbole -- it's just the truth. **
As I tell people at every campaign stop, we're going to win this thing if we do what's necessary to not fall short in the final moments. What happened two years ago in my state is fresh in my mind, and I am going to fight until the final buzzer to make certain we win this thing in the end. Are you with me?
[**Our fundraising numbers are lagging, so if you could make a $3 donation to my reelection campaign it would mean the world to me personally -- and it would place our team one step closer to our goal.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc124/2a380d31/373d5def/f17ebc/2776717694/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0dGIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTEwM19NV0g0VEItVEJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4tb?refcode=e20181103_MWH4TB-TB_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Three days is all we have left. Let's get to work!
Thanks,
Tammy

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc124/2a380d31/373d5def/f17ebd/2776717694/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0dGIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTEwM19NV0g0VEItVEJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4tb?refcode=e20181103_MWH4TB-TB_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: We're asking all our supporters this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I'll cut to the chase. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa79a/34a064cc/3131c23/70ced6d/2555032855/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hello, I'll cut to the chase: This is the LAST WEEKEND before Election Day, so we need to make the most of it. We're asking all our supporters to sign up for one last volunteer shift today, to help push us over the edge to victory. This race is incredibly close, so a few more doors knocked really could make the difference. I'm reaching out because there is a canvassing event happening in your area and we really need you there. Click here to RSVP: **[RSVP](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa79a/34a064cc/3131c23/70ced6a/2555032855/VEsE/ "https://abrams.bsd.net/GOTVEvents")** At the end of the day, this race will be won or lost on Georgians' front steps. We need folks knocking on doors, every day between now and Election Day. If you don't have any canvassing experience, don't worry about it! Our organizers will teach you everything you need to know. The important part is to just have folks out in their communities reminding people to make a plan to vote. So please, sign up to volunteer today. And bring a friend with you! We've only got three more days to win this election for Stacey Abrams. None of us wants to wake up on November 7th and wish we had done more. All my best, \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams

clean_body: I'll cut to the chase. | "" | | | Hello, I'll cut to the chase: This is the LAST WEEKEND before Election Day, so we need to make the most of it. We're asking all our supporters to sign up for one last volunteer shift today, to help push us over the edge to victory. This race is incredibly close, so a few more doors knocked really could make the difference. I'm reaching out because there is a canvassing event happening in your area and we really need you there. Click here to RSVP: "" At the end of the day, this race will be won or lost on Georgians' front steps. We need folks knocking on doors, every day between now and Election Day. If you don't have any canvassing experience, don't worry about it! Our organizers will teach you everything you need to know. The important part is to just have folks out in their communities reminding people to make a plan to vote. So please, sign up to volunteer today. And bring a friend with you! We've only got three more days to win this election for Stacey Abrams. None of us wants to wake up on November 7th and wish we had done more. All my best, \- Lauren Groh-Wargo Campaign Manager #TeamAbrams "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-447 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Stacey Abrams for Governor, All rights reserved "" | | Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Quick early voting reminder (and an endorsement!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
REMINDER: Ohio early voting is open Sunday 1-5PM and Monday 8AM-2PM | |
---
_REMINDER: __Ohio early voting is open_ **Sunday 1-5PM and Monday 8AM-2PM** [Enter your address and find your early voting location now >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9092/5486deaa/24a1918d/dcf7d7d/2291926861/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") [FIND OUT WHERE TO VOTE EARLY](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9092/5486deaa/24a1918d/dcf7d7d/2291926861/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH") Folks: I want to make sure and urge you to **vote for Judge Michael P. Donnelly for Ohio Supreme Court.** The Ohio Supreme Court matters, and in today's world, it's never been more crucial to elect a justice like Judge Michael Donnelly. Throughout his career, Judge Michael Donnelly has fought to ensure fairness and accessibility in Ohio's courts, regardless of the means of the accused. His commitment to these principles is why I believe he will make a great Justice. **I am proud to endorse Judge Michael P. Donnelly and his candidacy for the Ohio Supreme Court --**[make a donation to his campaign ](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9092/5486deaa/24a1918d/dcf7d7c/2291926861/VEsF/ "https://donnellyforjustice.com/donate/")or [sign up to volunteer to get out the vote for all our incredible candidates.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9092/5486deaa/24a1918d/dcf7d7f/2291926861/VEsC/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/") Thank you, \-- Tim

* * *

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

name: Team Scholten
subject: Three polls = GAME ON!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Three recent polls all show this race coming down to the wire in the closing days. A poll by Change Research had J.D. Scholten trailing by only one point. A live poll by the New York Times currently shows a four point deficit for J.D., and a generic ballot poll released today by the Des Moines Register showed an unnamed Republican candidate leads an unnamed Democrat by four percentage points.
Said J. Ann Selzer, president of Selzer & Co., the firm that conducted the poll for the Des Moines Register:
"(Christie Vilsack - the toughest challenge King has faced) came within 8 points (in 2012), and that was considered quite impressive. So for us to be showing a lead for him that’s half that — it’s just something we’ve not seen before."
**It’s clear this seat is absolutely in play** and what we do over the next three days will mean the difference between two more years of Steve King, or a fresh new leader in J.D. Scholten. [**_Please donate what you can today_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3003565/19679033/119594008?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzcyZmI2MS1kN2RmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EPQWIy9bww9tHPNH4HOh4YtSLRDMzbNO9tJBqiHoOCY=), or [**_sign up to volunteer_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/3003566/19679034/1415315987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzcyZmI2MS1kN2RmLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EPQWIy9bww9tHPNH4HOh4YtSLRDMzbNO9tJBqiHoOCY=) to door knock or join our remote phone bank team.
As J.D. likes to say, GAME ON!
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten

name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: URGENT: Two things you need to see
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Ever since Trump took office, we've fought against his agenda. We've fought against the congressional Republicans that enabled him. Honestly, it's been a slog. The disgusting, demeaning, hate-filled rhetoric. The barely-coherent tweets. The never-ending attempts to repeal or sabotage health care. At times, it's felt like it would never end. **But on Tuesday, we can stop it.** If Democrats win a House majority on Tuesday, we can take back our democracy. [**And we need your support to do it -- if you can pitch in $5, $10, or even more.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce0/622b7b5b/1dd1d0e9/307b63b6/3826306315/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181103?refcode=dwse181103_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce0/622b7b5b/1dd1d0e9/307b63a9/3826306315/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAzIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181103?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse181103_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce0/622b7b5b/1dd1d0e9/307b63a9/3826306315/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAzIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181103?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse181103_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce0/622b7b5b/1dd1d0e9/307b63a9/3826306315/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAzIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181103?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse181103_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce0/622b7b5b/1dd1d0e9/307b63a8/3826306315/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181103?refcode=dwse181103_m_other&refcode2=861769")** I have two major requests for you today. If you haven't voted yet, and you're eligible -- **[click here to find where you can vote](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce0/622b7b5b/1dd1d0e9/307b63ab/3826306315/VEsC/ "https://iwillvote.com/") and make a plan.** [**Rush in $5 or more to help us reach our $15,000 Election Day goal.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce0/622b7b5b/1dd1d0e9/307b63b6/3826306315/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181103?refcode=dwse181103_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Our field team and volunteers are working non-stop to help Democrats up and down the ballot. Every last voter they get to the polls could make the difference between victory and defeat. So please, [**make a contribution before it's too late.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ce0/622b7b5b/1dd1d0e9/307b63b6/3826306315/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181103?refcode=dwse181103_m&recurring=true&amount=5") The stakes are too high not to act now. Thank you. Debbie
---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Can't put all our eggs in one basket.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Let's build a blue wave to last.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b6f1/2f5ea88d/7beafaa5/2cbd8b24/3893132229/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&utm_campaign=countdown-2&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, Can you believe we're so close to Election Day? We're so close to showing the Trump administration that we won't stand for their policies of hatred and division. We're so close to electing candidates up and down the ballot who believe that climate change is real and want to do something about it. **We're so close to putting more power behind our climate change clean energy movement, but we can't be putting all of our eggs in one basket.** [**Whether or not we win on Tuesday, we need to be thinking big. Will you help me build a progressive movement to last?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b6f1/2f5ea88d/7beafaa5/2cbd8b24/3893132229/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&utm_campaign=countdown-2&utm_medium=ema") It's the final countdown to the election -- and each of us have one final chance to make an impact on who will prove victorious on Tuesday. I sure do hope we win. But we also need to be thinking beyond Tuesday. We need to build a progressive movement that's ready to take on the worst that Trump throws at us over the next two years. We need to build on our progress here in Washington state, and hold our leaders accountable. [**I'm ready for that fight. Are you? Chip in now, and let's build a wave to last.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b6f1/2f5ea88d/7beafaa5/2cbd8b24/3893132229/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&utm_campaign=countdown-2&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b6f1/2f5ea88d/7beafaa5/2cbd8b24/3893132229/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&utm_campaign=countdown-2&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b6f1/2f5ea88d/7beafaa5/2cbd8b24/3893132229/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-02_countdown-2&utm_campaign=countdown-2&utm_medium=ema")

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Let me know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
My team will keep me updated on these numbers, and it's wonderful news like this that keeps me going. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, Virginians were out all across the Commonwealth today, gathering in their communities and heading out to talk to voters about this election. **Let me tell you, when I see our supporters, holding signs for our Virginia Democrats and bringing their whole families out to events, it 's wonderful. It's a wonderful sight to see.**

And when my team tells me about all of our amazing fundraising from small-dollar grassroots donors like you, it blows me away.

I want you to know I hear the numbers, I know how many of you stepped up throughout this campaign and how many of you will again in these final three days. [In this year alone, there have been more than 50,000 small-dollar grassroots donations to our campaign, and over 2,000 so far in the first three days of November.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10a7/3e0906/751bb404/3e377d29/656656955/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181103_3_FR_TK_three-days-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+In+this+year+alone+there+have+been+more+&utm_campaign=20181103_3_FR_TK_three-days-LDND&source=20181103_3_FR_TK_three-days-LDND")

I know we can get to 5,000 donations in November and cross the finish line strong for my Senate race and these 11 incredible House candidates. With your support and $30,025 more to drive the program, we'll be prepared for whatever comes our way on Election Day.

**Derek, I 'm asking, can you be one of the donors who steps up between right now and November 6th? subject: did you see this?

body:
These poll numbers prove we're moving in the right direction. Victory is within our reach! |

[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa791/34a064cc/375eaae/70ceb74/2860245883/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hey - Did you see this? Stacey pulled ahead of Kemp! [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa791/34a064cc/375eaae/70ceb75/2860245883/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTAzMjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11032018.2-full") This is a BIG DEAL! But don't get too excited. In Georgia, a candidate needs to get 50% plus one vote, or this race goes to a runoff election that drags on until December. And you know what that means? Republican donors' _full attention_ will be on Georgia. There's no telling what they would spend to eek out another win in 2018. But what we do know is that they will turn Georgia into a symbolic battleground to prove that the Trump/Kemp agenda can still win. We can't let that happen. These poll numbers prove we're moving in the right direction. Victory is within our reach! But to win, we need to close the gap in just **THREE DAYS.** So we're asking you: **[Make a donation to help us surge ahead and win this election for Stacey Abrams in just 3 days>>](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa791/34a064cc/375eaae/70ceb75/2860245883/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTAzMjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11032018.2-full")** Since the beginning, our campaign has been powered by grassroots supporters like you. body:
[1]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1001&akid=23965%2E444211%2E-C4Fo- ]A brand-new poll out today shows this race is officially DEAD EVEN.

brand-new poll out today shows this race is officially DEAD EVEN. We’ll
get right to it: we need you to rush
a contribution of
$3
or more to Beto’s campaign right now.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1021&akid=23965%2E444211%2E-C4Fo- ]Contribute
$3
»

The energy we’re seeing on the ground here in Texas is incredible:

* Texans voted early at levels we’ve only seen during presidential
elections

* Early voting among young Texans is up by more than 500%

* As you’re reading this, tens of thousands of volunteers (many of whom
have never volunteered for a campaign before) are out knocking on
doors, reminding our supporters to vote for Beto

Poll after poll shows Beto has closed the gap, and now, this brand-new
poll shows Beto and Cruz dead even: 49% - 49%. But what the pollsters and
the pundits never accounted for was the sheer number of brand-new voters
who are showing up and voting for Beto. It’s up to us to get even more
Beto supporters to the polls.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181103&t=1022&akid=23965%2E444211%2E-C4Fo- ]Our campaign is powered exclusively by

subject: There's still so much to do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Every dollar you give before our final grassroots deadline on November 5 will help my team get out the vote for strong Democrats. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter,

Election Day is in only 3 days, and we still have so much work to do. Every dollar you give before our final grassroots deadline on November 5 will help my team get out the vote for strong Democrats running to flip critical House seats in California.

There are up to 10 seats in play in the Golden State -- enough to decide overall control of the House! And in these close races, our efforts will make a real difference.

I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me raise $12,042 more before Monday night to keep our voter outreach program going strong.** **[Will you please chip in $10 or whatever you can right now?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** **_I_** _f you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ ****[Express Donate: $10](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036698/4ac3d62d/69f82fb2/1ce2a496/3097903968/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM")**** ****[Express Donate: $25](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036698/4ac3d62d/69f82fb2/1ce2a497/3097903968/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM")**** ****[Express Donate: $50](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036698/4ac3d62d/69f82fb2/1ce2a494/3097903968/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM")**** ****[Express Donate: $100](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036698/4ac3d62d/69f82fb2/1ce2a495/3097903968/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM")**** ****[Or, donate another amount](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM&&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** Our healthcare, our workers' rights, the future of our retirement benefits, and our environment are all on the line. If we don't take back the House, Republicans will be emboldened and pass every regressive policy they've dreamed of for decades.

****[So please, pitch in to make sure we have what it takes to bring the blue wave to California on Election Day!](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

Thank you so much,

Linda ** ** | ****Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.**** ****[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181103_Update_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

name: Team Braun
subject: Super Saturday This Weekend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
---
| | Peter, With Election Day coming up on Tuesday, it’s more critical than ever that we all chip in and do our part to help retire Sleepin’ Joe and **send Mike Braun to drain the DC Swamp**! This weekend we are hosting Super Saturday around Indiana, and **we need Hoosier Conservatives like you to get involved** by volunteering at your local GOP office or host your own Super Saturday by getting your friends together to knock on doors and make phone calls!
# Every door knocked on and every call made makes a difference. The future of our nation is at stake this Tuesday and our prosperity is in our hands.
**Let’s get out the vote for Mike and win this thing!** Team Braun **P.S. Be sure to tag #TeamBraun in all your pictures, videos, and Facebook Live this weekend!** [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjuhplt-kujulhlke-y/) |

clean_body: | | Peter, With Election Day coming up on Tuesday, it’s more critical than ever that we all chip in and do our part to help retire Sleepin’ Joe and send Mike Braun to drain the DC Swamp! This weekend we are hosting Super Saturday around Indiana, and we need Hoosier Conservatives like you to get involved by volunteering at your local GOP office or host your own Super Saturday by getting your friends together to knock on doors and make phone calls! Every door knocked on and every call made makes a difference. The future of our nation is at stake this Tuesday and our prosperity is in our hands. Let’s get out the vote for Mike and win this thing! Team Braun P.S. Be sure to tag #TeamBraun in all your pictures, videos, and Facebook Live this weekend! | ---|---|--- You're receiving this email because you subscribed via our , or donated to our campaign but you may if you're no longer interested. Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

Everyone at campaign headquarters is worried, team, and we're hoping you can help us out.

**Ever since Bob's opponent outraised us in the first half of October, we've been worried about catching up.** We need to pay for the tv ads, online communication and organizing efforts that will get Bob over the line on Election Day, and the money just isn't coming in like we need it to.

Bob is counting on all of us -- his team here at headquarters and his network of grassroots supporters in Pennsylvania and across the nation -- to work together to mount the best possible campaign over the next three days. **A group of donors are standing by and ready to match up to $30,000 in online donations before the end of the weekend. There's never been a better time to chip in $5 (becomes $10).** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 (Becomes $50)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 (Becomes $100)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thank you, seriously, for everything you've done for Bob. We all really appreciate it.

Team Casey

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181103_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
